words.meaning: 烟，气，汽
words.example: Moscow has joined the list of capitals afflicted by congestion and traffic fumes.
words.exampleCn: 莫斯科已成为受交通堵塞和尾气排放之苦的首都之一。

words.meaning: 明确的；肯定的；积极的｜搭 positive role 积极的作用；a positive example 积极的榜样；a positive number 正数
words.example: Customer comments, both positive and negative, are recorded by staff.
words.exampleCn: 对于顾客的意见，无论是肯定的还是否定的，都由职员予以记录。

words.meaning: 助理的；副的 助理
words.example: The employees felt that their assistant manager was closer to them than the manager.
words.exampleCn: 和经理相比，员工们感觉助理经理与他们更亲近。

words.meaning: 加农炮，大炮
words.example: They relied on grenades and cannons to repel their enemies.
words.exampleCn: 他们用手榴弹和大炮击退了敌人。

words.meaning: 义务，职责，责任
words.example: Every government has the right and obligation to run its own internal affairs well.
words.exampleCn: 每一任政府都有管理好国家内政的权利和职责。

words.meaning: 曲棍球；冰球
words.example: Both skating and ice hockey were included in the Antwerp Olympic Games in 1920.
words.exampleCn: 1920年在安特卫普举办的奥运会包括滑冰和冰球两个项目。

words.meaning: 自由，自由权；许可，准许；[常pl.]过于随便，放肆｜搭 take liberties with sth. （尤指对书）任意改动；at liberty to do sth. 有权做…
words.example: You have liberty to use all the library facilities.
words.exampleCn: 你们可以使用图书馆里的所有设施。

words.meaning: 杀虫剂，农药
words.example: The main factors that could be contributing to the decline of the species include acid rain and the spread of the pesticide residues.
words.exampleCn: 导致这个物种灭绝的主要因素包括酸雨和农药残留物的扩散。

words.meaning: 民意测验；政治选举，大选 对…进行民意测验；获得…选票｜搭 public opinion poll 民意调查；conduct a poll on 对…进行调查
words.example: The team is conducting a poll among freshmen.
words.exampleCn: 这个小组正在新生中进行一次民意调查。

words.meaning: 可退还的，可归还的，可偿还的
words.example: The deposit on the house is refundable.
words.exampleCn: 这个房子的押金是可以退还的。

words.meaning: 想家的，思乡的
words.example: I was homesick at first and missed my family.
words.exampleCn: 起初，我思乡心切，想念我的家人。

words.meaning: 有同情心的，表示怜悯的｜搭 compassionate attitude 热诚的态度；compassionate leave照顾性准假（一般指丧假）
words.example: We should try our best to create a more compassionate society.
words.exampleCn: 我们应该竭尽全力营造一个更人性化的社会。

words.meaning: 使适应，使熟悉情况（或环境等）；给…定位，给…定向；使朝向；转至特定方向；适应（＝orient）
words.example: The course at this university has a vocational focus on preparing its graduates for work, so students are orientated at employment.
words.exampleCn: 这所大学的课程以职业为中心，注重毕业生工作之前的准备工作，因此将学生朝着就业方向培养。

words.meaning: 洞察力，深刻的了解；顿悟
words.example: The application of our new insights into the Amazonian past would change present policies on development in the region.
words.exampleCn: 我们对亚马孙地区的过去有了新的了解，这会改变目前我们针对这一地区的开发政策。

words.meaning: 抵抗；抗（病等）；耐（热等）
words.example: Bugs and weeds will begin to resist poisons.
words.exampleCn: 害虫和野草会开始产生抗药性。

words.meaning: 滑行，滑翔
words.example: The pilot managed to glide down to a safe landing.
words.exampleCn: 飞行员成功地使飞机向下滑行并安全着陆。

words.meaning: 伤亡（人员），伤亡者；损失的东西；伤亡事故
words.example: The major casualty of cutting down forests on a large scale has been the environment.
words.exampleCn: 受大规模森林砍伐影响最多的是环境。

words.meaning: 信仰，信条；相信
words.example: The belief that rain and murky weather make people more unhappy is borne out by a study in Belgium.
words.exampleCn: 人们相信雨天和阴沉的天气会让人更加忧郁，这种想法已被比利时的一项研究所证实。

words.meaning: 集中；专心，专注；浓缩，浓度
words.example: This concentration of vehicles makes air quality in urban areas unpleasant and sometimes dangerous to breathe.
words.exampleCn: 交通工具如此集中造成城市地区空气质量的恶劣，有时甚至不宜呼吸。

words.meaning: 用力拖（或拉）
words.example: The fisherman tugged the small boat out of the water.
words.exampleCn: 渔民用力把小船拖到岸上。

words.meaning: 进行；前进；继续
words.example: Our work is proceeding slowly.
words.exampleCn: 我们的工作进程缓慢。

words.meaning: 地位；身份；状况｜搭 marital status 婚姻状况
words.example: The chart shows the amount of leisure time enjoyed by men and women of different employment status.
words.exampleCn: 这张图表显示了不同职业身份的男性和女性所享有的闲暇时间量。

words.meaning: 公文，文件，证件 用文件（或文献等）证明；记载
words.example: In the English-speaking scientific world, surveys of books and documents consulted in libraries and other information agencies have shown that very little foreign-language material is ever consulted.
words.exampleCn: 在以讲英语为主的科学界里，调查显示，科学家们几乎不参考图书馆及其他信息机构中非英语书籍和文献。

words.meaning: 床垫
words.example: A good mattress is a wise investment for people who want to avoid headaches.
words.exampleCn: 对那些想避免头疼的人来说，买一张好床垫不失为一项聪明的投资。

words.meaning: 敌方的；不友善的；不利的
words.example: The luxuriant forests of Amazonia seem ageless, unconquerable, a habitat totally hostile to human civilization.
words.exampleCn: 茂密的亚马孙丛林似乎是永恒的，无法征服的，是一个完全不利于人类文明存在的地方。

words.meaning: 干涉，干扰；介于其间
words.example: The bank intervened with a large dollar purchase.
words.exampleCn: 那家银行以大量购进美元来进行干预。

words.meaning: 促进；提升；促销｜搭 promote mutual understanding 促进相互理解；promote the sale of sth. 促销；promote cultural communication 增进文化交流
words.example: The band has gone on tour to promote their new album.
words.exampleCn: 这个乐队已开始巡回宣传他们的新唱片。

words.meaning: 碰，撞；颠簸着前进 碰撞；隆起物｜搭 bump against/into 碰到；bump along/down 颠簸着前进
words.example: The policeman ran after the thief, bumping against people in his hurry.
words.exampleCn: 那个警察追赶小偷，匆忙中撞到了人。

words.meaning: 重聚，团聚；（久别后的）聚会，联谊活动｜搭 annual reunion 年度聚会；family reunion 家庭聚会
words.example: All the members of the club gathered to have a reunion dinner last weekend.
words.exampleCn: 上周末，这个俱乐部的所有成员进行了一次聚餐。

words.meaning: 消化的；和消化有关的｜搭 digestive tract 消化道
words.example: Professor introduced the feeding habits and digestive systems of starfish.
words.exampleCn: 教授介绍了海星摄取食物的习惯以及它们的消化系统。

words.meaning: 在当地居民家居住的时期｜搭 homestay family 寄宿家庭
words.example: A: I've heard that you want to move into a homestay family. Is that correct? B: Yes, that's right. A
words.exampleCn: ：我听说你想搬入一个寄宿家庭，是吗？B：是的。

words.meaning: 把…交托给，提交；犯（错误），干（坏事）｜搭 commit crimes 犯罪；commit suicide 自杀；commit oneself to 使自己承担
words.example: The drivers refused to commit themselves to the traffic accident.
words.exampleCn: 司机们拒绝承担这起交通事故的责任。

words.meaning: 几乎，简直；实际上
words.example: There is evidence that the reaction principle was applied practically well before the rocket was invented.
words.exampleCn: 有证据证明，反作用原理在火箭发明前就得到了很好的实际应用。

words.meaning: 特技演员；杂技演员
words.example: They are acrobats with the Albanian State Circus.
words.exampleCn: 他们是阿尔巴尼亚国家马戏团的杂技演员。

words.meaning: （尤指大宗的）收入；税收｜搭 anticipated revenue 预期收入；financial revenue 财政收入；tax revenue 税收
words.example: A new strategy for pricing known as "revenue management" is now being used by many large companies.
words.exampleCn: 现在许多大公司都采用一项名为“收入管理”的新定价策略。

words.meaning: 镍；（美国和加拿大的）五分镍币
words.example: Nickel can be used to make batteries.
words.exampleCn: 镍可以用来制造电池。

words.meaning: 软的；无力的
words.example: Some of you may come from cultures that accept limp handshakes as normal.
words.exampleCn: 你们有些人的文化习俗可能认为无力的握手很正常。

words.meaning: 吐唾沫（或痰）；喷出 唾液，唾沫｜搭 spit out 吐出
words.example: Don't spit at random.
words.exampleCn: 不要随地吐痰。

words.meaning: 不规则，无规律
words.example: To date, the most widely used commercial biometric system is the handkey, a type of hand scanner which reads the unique shape, size and irregularities of people's hands.
words.exampleCn: 迄今为止，在商业生物测定系统中应用最广泛的是掌形识别仪，这是一种读取人们手掌独有的形状、大小和不规则性的手掌扫描仪。

words.meaning: 微风，和风
words.example: The systems mix light, sounds, breezes and scents to stimulate people who spend long periods below ground.
words.exampleCn: 该系统综合了光线、声音、微风和香味来刺激长期待在地下的人。

words.meaning: 林阴道，大街；方法，途径
words.example: They explored every avenue to cure his cancer.
words.exampleCn: 他们寻找各种方法来治疗他的癌症。

words.meaning: 放大，扩大
words.example: This microscope can magnify an object 100,000 times.
words.exampleCn: 这个显微镜可将物体放大10万倍。

words.meaning: 蜂房，蜂箱；蜂房内的蜂群；闹市，忙碌之地 （使）入蜂箱；群居
words.example: For the three-week long bloom, beekeepers can hire out their hives for $32 each.
words.exampleCn: 在长达三周的花期里，养蜂人可以将他们的蜂箱以每个32美元的价格租出去。

words.meaning: 氧化物
words.example: The greenhouse effect is a natural phenomenon due to the presence of greenhouse gases—water vapour, carbon dioxide and nitrous oxide—in the atmosphere.
words.exampleCn: 温室效应是一种由大气中的水蒸气、二氧化碳和一氧化氮这些温室气体形成的自然现象。

words.meaning: 牛犊；崽，幼兽
words.example: A cow produces only one calf a year.
words.exampleCn: 牛一年只生一胎。

words.meaning: 最好的；最重要的
words.example: The foremost research center of the day is in the USA.
words.exampleCn: 当今最先进的研究中心在美国。

words.meaning: 程序，手续；过程｜搭 regular procedure 正规手续；the registration procedure登记手续；emergency procedure 紧急状况的处理程序；follow accepted procedure 遵循惯用的步骤
words.example: I hate the cumbersome administrative procedures.
words.exampleCn: 我讨厌这些麻烦的行政手续。

words.meaning: 集合；装配
words.example: All components were assembled in the front workshop.
words.exampleCn: 所有部件都是在前面的车间组装的。

words.meaning: （文章、学说等的）剽窃，抄袭；剽窃物
words.example: I'd like to mention the question of plagiarism in particular.
words.exampleCn: 我想特别提一下剽窃问题。

words.meaning: 奔驰，飞跑，飞驰｜搭 at a gallop 以最快速度，急速地
words.example: My sister set off at a gallop this morning.
words.exampleCn: 今天早上我姐姐匆忙出发。

words.meaning: 正式承诺；发誓，保证；抵押，典当 誓约，保证；抵押｜搭 fulfill one's pledge 履行诺言；make/give a pledge to do sth. 保证做某事
words.example: The prime minister has pledged today that he will make 250 million dollars available to help the drought-stricken farmers.
words.exampleCn: 总理今天承诺将拨25亿美元帮助受旱灾影响的农民。

words.meaning: 有效的，生效的；给人深刻印象的，显著的｜搭 effective measures 有效措施；an effective remedy 有效药物
words.example: Which advertisement is the most effective?
words.exampleCn: 哪一种广告最有效？

words.meaning: 赏识，鉴赏；感激；涨价，增值｜搭 appreciate doing sth. 对…表示感激
words.example: I deeply appreciate your care, but I'm fine now.
words.exampleCn: 我对你的关心深表感激，但是现在我很好。

words.meaning: 否认，否定；拒绝｜搭 deny oneself 节制，戒绝，摒弃；deny doing sth. 否认做过某事；deny a charge 否认控告
words.example: If you don't acknowledge the source of your information, you might be denied entry into the university.
words.exampleCn: 如果你不供认信息的来源，你可能会被这所大学拒收。

words.meaning: 协会，工会，同盟；联合，合并｜搭 the European Union 欧洲联盟；labour union 工会
words.example: The speech contest is presided by the Student Union.
words.exampleCn: 这个演讲比赛是由学生会主办的。

words.meaning: 责任，责任心；职责，任务｜搭 perform one's responsibilities 履行或行使职责；assume the responsibility 承担责任
words.example: The company needs a sales manager with responsibility for North American market.
words.exampleCn: 该公司需要一位负责北美市场的销售经理。

words.meaning: 遵守，服从；适应，顺应；相一致，相符合｜搭 conform to the custom of society 遵从社会习俗；conform with the regulations 遵守规章制度
words.example: All students must conform to the school rules.
words.exampleCn: 所有的学生都必须遵守校规。

words.meaning: 方便的；手边的；手巧的
words.example: To do this work needs handy men.
words.exampleCn: 做这项工作需要些手巧的人。// Scissors are a handy tool to have in the kitchen. 剪刀是厨房里的一种便利工具。

words.meaning: 通知，报告
words.example: If the library is not notified and you are 15 minutes late, your time can be given to someone else.
words.exampleCn: 如果你没有通知图书馆，那么在你迟到15分钟后，你的时间就会给其他人。

words.meaning: 壮观的，壮丽的，极好的；堂皇的，豪华的；灿烂的，辉煌的｜搭 a splendid scene 壮观的场面
words.example: They marry rich men merely because they are rich and have splendid houses.
words.exampleCn: 她们嫁给富人，仅仅是因为富人有钱和豪华的房子。

words.meaning: 方向；趋势，动向；[pl.]用法说明；指导
words.example: Shall we ask somebody for directions again?
words.exampleCn: 我们还要找人问一下路吗？

words.meaning: 将…处死；实施，执行
words.example: We execute company policy for homeowners.
words.exampleCn: 我们执行公司针对业主的政策。

words.meaning: 证据；目击者 目击；为…作证
words.example: Tom witnessed the accident.
words.exampleCn: 汤姆目睹了那起意外事故。

words.meaning: 肘；（衣服的）肘部
words.example: His forearms were black and blue from wrist to elbow.
words.exampleCn: 他的小臂从手腕到肘部又青又紫。

words.meaning: 有限的
words.example: Some banks open for a limited time on Saturdays.
words.exampleCn: 一些银行在周六限时开放。

words.meaning: 〈总称〉船只；容器；血管
words.example: Sea ports have been transformed by the advent of powered vessels.
words.exampleCn: 机动船只的出现改变了海港的外观。

words.meaning: 私人的；私下的；私立的
words.example: May I ask you a private question?
words.exampleCn: 我能问你一个私人问题吗？

words.meaning: 立体声的 立体声（装置）｜搭 personal stereos 随身听
words.example: I've got a fridge and a stereo system which I've just bought from a friend.
words.exampleCn: 我刚从一个朋友那里买了一台冰箱和一套立体声音响。

words.meaning: 浸泡
words.example: We'll get you up to your room and soak your feet; you'll be okay.
words.exampleCn: 我们带你到房间里泡泡脚，这样你会感觉舒服些。

words.meaning: 发胖的，肥胖的，强壮的；结实的，牢固的；顽强的，坚毅的｜搭 stout wind 暴风；a stout ship 牢固的船
words.example: This machine was completely encased in a stout, iron cylinder.
words.exampleCn: 这台机器完全置于一个结实的铁筒内。

words.meaning: 多脂的；油滑的
words.example: Fish contains a lot of protein, and is not greasy.
words.exampleCn: 鱼肉富含蛋白质且脂肪含量低。

words.meaning: 自夸；夸耀
words.example: She is always boasting about how wonderful her children are.
words.exampleCn: 她总是夸耀她的孩子们多么出色。

words.meaning: 快的；敏捷的，迅速的
words.example: Hong Kong has cheap, swift and effective public transport.
words.exampleCn: 香港的公共交通便宜、快捷且高效。

words.meaning: 无知，愚昧；不知道｜搭 ignorance about 不知…
words.example: Not ignorance, but the ignorance of ignorance, is the death of knowledge.
words.exampleCn: 知识的死亡不是无知本身，而是对无知的无知。

words.meaning: 美学的；审美的
words.example: What are utilitarian objects to a Westerner may be prized aesthetic objects in other cultures.
words.exampleCn: 被西方人视为功利性的东西，在其他文化中可能会因其美学价值而备受推崇。

words.meaning: 屏幕，银幕；遮蔽；屏风，帘；筛子 掩蔽，遮蔽；包庇；筛选；放映（电影），播放（电视节目）
words.example: Everything on the screen interests those children.
words.exampleCn: 那些孩子觉得屏幕上的一切都很有趣。

words.meaning: 不在场的；心不在焉的
words.example: Why were you absent from my birthday party yesterday?
words.exampleCn: 你昨天怎么没来参加我的生日派对呢？

words.meaning: 刮，擦
words.example: He scraped the mud off his shoes with the knife.
words.exampleCn: 他用小刀刮去鞋上的泥土。

words.meaning: 提升，晋级；促进，增进；发起，发扬；宣传，推销
words.example: Would you be willing to attend any of the special promotions for the new channel?
words.exampleCn: 你愿意参加新频道的任何特别宣传活动吗？

words.meaning: 娱乐，消遣｜搭 recreation area 娱乐休闲区；open-air/outdoor recreation户外娱乐活动
words.example: As you can see, the building you are in now contains this main lounge, the dining room and the recreation room.
words.exampleCn: 如你所见，你现在所在的这幢大楼包括主休息室、餐厅和娱乐室。

words.meaning: 专门研究，专攻；专用于，使适应特殊目的｜搭 specialised equipment 专用设备
words.example: Two years later, we will specialise and take courses in one or two subjects.
words.exampleCn: 两年后，我们将专攻一两门学科并学习这些学科的课程。// As the brain evolved, one side became specialised for fine control of movement. 随着大脑的进化，大脑的一边开始专门负责对运动进行精密控制。

words.meaning: 壮丽的，宏伟的，华丽的；高尚的｜搭 magnificent performance 出色表演
words.example: The garage around the corner contains the magnificent old Rolls-Royce which used to belong to George.
words.exampleCn: 街角的车库里停着一辆漂亮的老式劳斯莱斯，它曾经是乔治的。

words.meaning: 痉挛的；间歇性的
words.example: Since the arrival of Europeans, the region experienced a period of spasmodic activity, between 1831 and 1857.
words.exampleCn: 自从欧洲人来到这个地区，在1831到1857年间它经历了一个间歇性的活跃时期。

words.meaning: 基金，专款；储备，蕴藏；[pl.]存款，资金 为…提供资金，给…拨款｜搭 raise funds 筹集资金；additional/extra fund 额外款项；mutual fund 互助基金
words.example: They provide funds for zoos in underdeveloped countries.
words.exampleCn: 他们为不发达国家的动物园提供资金。

words.meaning: 感知，察觉；认识到，理解
words.example: While I was examining the small stars, I perceived one that appeared visibly larger than the rest.
words.exampleCn: 我观察那些小星星时，发现有一颗明显比其他的大。// Tom perceived Mary's comment as a challenge. 汤姆认为玛丽的批评是对他的一种激励。

words.meaning: 制造商，制造厂，生产者
words.example: Manufacturers must sell these cleaner cars.
words.exampleCn: 制造商必须卖掉这些清洁车。

words.meaning: [常pl.]规格，规范；明确说明；（产品等的）说明书｜搭 the specification of a microwave oven 微波炉说明书
words.example: The house has been built exactly to our specifications.
words.exampleCn: 房子完全是按照我们的工程设计书建造的。

words.meaning: 安排；列入，收进（清单等） 时刻表；清单｜搭 ahead of schedule 提前；a train/flight schedule 火车／航班时刻表；on schedule 按约定时间，按时，准时；behind schedule 落后于计划进度，晚于规定时间，晚点；be scheduled for 定在某时（进行）
words.example: The lectures are scheduled for Tuesday and Thursday.
words.exampleCn: 讲座安排在星期二和星期四。

words.meaning: 安排；[常pl.]准备工作｜搭 course arrangement 课程安排；seat arrangement 座位安排
words.example: Larger firms appear to be more willing to experiment with flexible working arrangements.
words.exampleCn: 较大型的企业似乎更愿意尝试弹性工作制。

words.meaning: 破坏，毁灭，摧毁｜搭 environmental destruction 环境破坏
words.example: The importation of cheap goods has often contributed to the destruction of local skills and indigenous markets.
words.exampleCn: 进口廉价商品常常会给当地的手工业和本土市场带来毁灭性的打击。

words.meaning: 灭火器；灭火者
words.example: If you discover a fire, shout "FIRE" and activate the nearest fire alarm. Attack the fire with an extinguisher but do not take any risks.
words.exampleCn: 如果发现火情，应大喊“着火了”，并按响离你最近的火警铃。使用灭火器去灭火，但不要冒险。

words.meaning: 假定，设想；承担（责任），就（职）｜搭 assume an obligation 承担义务；assume responsibility 承担责任
words.example: Ecologists have assumed that tropical ecosystems were shaped entirely by natural forces.
words.exampleCn: 生态学家设想热带生态系统完全是由自然的力量形成的。

words.meaning: 比例；部分；相称｜搭 in proportion (to)（与…）成比例；out of proportion to sth. 与某物不成比例；proportion of …的比例；take a small proportion 占少量比例
words.example: The proportion of the population still speaking this language is very small.
words.exampleCn: 只有少数人还在说这种语言。

words.meaning: 离去，外出；向前；向某处｜搭 call forth 使产生，引起；bring forth 提出；set forth 阐明，陈述；and so forth 等等；back and forth 来回地，往返，来来往往地
words.example: From this day forth I will study much harder.
words.exampleCn: 从今以后我将更加努力学习。

words.meaning: 裁判；仲裁，调停 裁判（员）；仲裁人，调停人；证明人，介绍人｜搭 to be the referee of a game 成为一项运动的裁判
words.example: Instead of spending much time refereeing between the two students, I went to the library.
words.exampleCn: 我没有花太多时间调停这两名学生，而是去了图书馆。

words.meaning: 放弃，抛弃；作罢
words.example: Jack has to forgo his vacation so as to take a summer English course.
words.exampleCn: 杰克为了参加暑期英语班只好放弃他的假期。

words.meaning: （给研究生的）半工半读助学金，（大学）研究生助教奖学金
words.example: The organization has contributed a lot to the social welfare activities such as assistantship programs.
words.exampleCn: 这个组织为社会福利作了很多贡献，比如给学生提供助教学金。

words.meaning: 会话，谈话
words.example: The conversation between the new students touched on many new subjects.
words.exampleCn: 新同学之间的对话涉及很多新话题。

words.meaning: 推荐，推荐信；劝告，建议｜搭 letter of recommendation 推荐信；on sb.'s recommendation在某人的推荐下
words.example: The skills of making presentation are on the recommendation of a professor.
words.exampleCn: 这些做报告的技巧是一位教授推荐的。

words.meaning: 图，图表，曲线图｜搭 bar graph 条形图
words.example: The graph below shows the population growth over the past several years.
words.exampleCn: 下图显示了过去几年的人口增长情况。

words.meaning: 抵消，补偿，弥补
words.example: Prices have risen in order to offset the increased cost of materials.
words.exampleCn: 为弥补原料成本的增加而提高了价格。

words.meaning: 人类，人；人性；人道，仁慈；[pl.]人文学科
words.example: The control of fire was the first and perhaps greatest of humanity's steps towards a life-enhancing technology.
words.exampleCn: 人类在迈向提高生活质量的技术旅途中，对火的支配是迈出的第一步，可能也是最重要的一步。

words.meaning: 完整无缺的；完好无损的
words.example: She hopes that her honor could remain intact.
words.exampleCn: 她希望自己的名誉依旧能完好无损。

words.meaning: 条纹
words.example: This skirt has a red stripe around the edge.
words.exampleCn: 这条裙子的边上有一圈红色条纹。

words.meaning: 机械的，机械制造的；呆板的；习惯性的；体力的｜搭 mechanical labour 体力劳动
words.example: Practise that and stop until it becomes mechanical.
words.exampleCn: 坚持练习，直到习惯成自然。

words.meaning: 连接；联结点；交叉路口
words.example: The power station was built at the junction of two rivers.
words.exampleCn: 那座发电站建于两河的交汇处。

words.meaning: 午睡，午休
words.example: These workers have no time for a siesta in summer.
words.exampleCn: 这些工人在夏天都没有时间午睡。

words.meaning: 发现，察觉；侦查，探测
words.example: The robots can detect unauthorised personnel and alert security staff immediately.
words.exampleCn: 机器人能够发现未经允许擅自闯入的人员，并马上向保安人员发出警报。

words.meaning: 弯路，便道 迂回，绕道
words.example: You can take a detour to get there and avoid Black Street.
words.exampleCn: 你可以绕道去那，不走布莱克大街。

words.meaning: 楼梯
words.example: On hearing the fire alarm, all people in the building should evacuate via the staircase.
words.exampleCn: 听到火警后，楼里的所有人都应该通过楼梯撤出大楼。

words.meaning: 关节炎
words.example: Rheumatoid arthritis belongs to the family of autoimmune diseases.
words.exampleCn: 类风湿性关节炎属于自体免疫系统类疾病。

words.meaning: 栅栏；关卡，检票口；障碍，隔阂；屏障｜搭 language barrier 语言障碍；trade barrier 贸易壁垒
words.example: The language barrier presents itself in stark form to firms who wish to market their products in other countries.
words.exampleCn: 对于那些希望在其他国家销售自己产品的公司来说，语言成了他们明显的障碍。

words.meaning: 代替；更换；把…放回原处
words.example: The new fuel is as inefficient as the one they have replaced.
words.exampleCn: 这种新型燃料和被它们取代的燃料一样效率低下。

words.meaning: 正义，公正；司法
words.example: Where might is master, justice is servant.
words.exampleCn: 有强权，就没有正义。

words.meaning: 毕业文凭（或证书）；资格证书
words.example: Tim got a diploma at a private college.
words.exampleCn: 蒂姆拿到了一所私立学院的毕业证书。

words.meaning: 签证｜搭 exit visa 出境签证；entry visa 入境签证；transit visa 过境签证；work visa 工作签证；study visa 学习签证
words.example: If you want to re-enter the island, you must get a multi-entry visa.
words.exampleCn: 如果你想要重新进入这个岛屿，就必须持有多次入境签证。

words.meaning: 宇宙的｜搭 cosmic dust 宇宙尘埃
words.example: The surface of Earth contains tons of cosmic dust.
words.exampleCn: 地球表面存有大量的宇宙尘埃。

words.meaning: 可延伸的，可展开的，可扩张的｜搭 extendable rod 拉杆；extendable bond 可延长债券
words.example: The visa is for 15 days, extendable to one month.
words.exampleCn: 此签证有效期为15天，可延期到一个月。

words.meaning: 大量，丰富，充足，充裕｜搭 in abundance 丰富
words.example: At the party, there was food and drink in abundance.
words.exampleCn: 宴会上，食品和饮料供应充足。

words.meaning: 监督人，管理人，指导者；主管
words.example: We have to put ourselves into the role of the manager or supervisor.
words.exampleCn: 我们必须要融入经理或主管的角色。

words.meaning: 混杂，掺杂；供义卖的旧杂货 混杂，掺杂｜搭 a jumble of 杂乱的一堆；jumble sale 废旧杂货廉价义卖；jumble sth. together/up 使乱堆，使杂乱
words.example: Here is a jumble of books and newspaper.
words.exampleCn: 这有一堆杂乱的书和报纸。

words.meaning: 装备，配备；使有能力，使有准备｜搭 be equipped with 配备有，装备有
words.example: Underground offices in Japan are equipped with "virtual" windows and mirrors.
words.exampleCn: 日本的地下办公室装有虚拟的窗户和镜子。

words.meaning: 永久的，持久的｜搭 an permanent address 永久住址
words.example: Instead of moving from place to place the family needed permanent dwellings.
words.exampleCn: 这家人需要一个长期的居住地，而不是不断地搬家。

words.meaning: 把…嵌入（或埋入、插入），扎牢；使深留脑中｜搭 be embedded in 植根于
words.example: The traditional idea is deeply embedded in our university.
words.exampleCn: 这个传统的想法在我们大学根深蒂固。

words.meaning: 定位；方向，方位；情况介绍；培训，训练｜搭 an orientation meeting 介绍会；an orientation course 上岗培训课
words.example: Now that everyone knows what team they're in, we'll get on with the orientation programme.
words.exampleCn: 既然每个人都明确了自己所在的小组，我们接着就开始进行培训项目。

words.meaning: 剥夺；使丧失｜搭 deprive sb. of sth. 剥夺某人某物
words.example: The accident deprived him of his feet.
words.exampleCn: 这场意外事故使他失去了双脚。

words.meaning: 使惊奇，使惊愕
words.example: We are amazed at the perfect symmetry of the building.
words.exampleCn: 我们惊诧于这座建筑物完美的对称。

words.meaning: 红利，股息；回报，效益；被除数
words.example: We pay a dividend of 15 percent.
words.exampleCn: 我们所付的股息为15％。

words.meaning: 喜爱；偏爱的事物（或人）；优先
words.example: Many people expressed a strong preference for the original plan.
words.exampleCn: 许多人强烈表示喜欢原先的计划。

words.meaning: 契约，合同[kənˈtrækt] 缩小；签约
words.example: Both sides should abide by the contract.
words.exampleCn: 双方都应该遵守合同。

words.meaning: 心神不安的；担心的
words.example: He was uneasy about the results of the final exams.
words.exampleCn: 他为期末考试成绩忧心忡忡。

words.meaning: 自动地；无意识地
words.example: Cars will be automatically controlled by computer in the future.
words.exampleCn: 未来的汽车将由计算机自动控制。

words.meaning: 女（性）的；雌的 女子
words.example: A cow produces only one calf a year whereas a female ostrich can lay an egg every other day.
words.exampleCn: 一头奶牛一年只能生一头小牛，而一只雌鸵鸟每隔一天就下一个蛋。

words.meaning: 财产；优点
words.example: Organizations
words.exampleCn: should recognize that their employees are a significant part of their financial assets. 公司应该承认员工是其财产的重要组成部分。

words.meaning: 运动员；体育家
words.example: The young athlete trains hard every day to prepare for the games.
words.exampleCn: 这位年轻的运动员每天刻苦训练，为比赛做准备。

words.meaning: 清楚
words.example: This article was written with clarity.
words.exampleCn: 这篇文章思路清晰。

words.meaning: 交换
words.example: Don't swap horses when crossing a stream.
words.exampleCn: 过河勿换马／危难之时不宜作大变动。

words.meaning: 老于世故的，老练的；精密的，尖端的，先进的；复杂的；高雅的，有教养的｜搭 a sophisticated columnist 老练的专栏作家
words.example: Space management is now a highly sophisticated method of manipulating the way we shop to ensure maximum profit.
words.exampleCn: 空间管理现在已成为一种非常尖端的技术，它通过控制我们的购物方式来实现利润最大化。

words.meaning: 大量；大批
words.example: Ports take advantage of the need for breaking up bulk material.
words.exampleCn: 港口充分利用了分解大宗原料的需求。

words.meaning: 〈总称〉机械；机构｜搭 industrial machinery 工业机械
words.example: The new mayor reformed the machinery of the government.
words.exampleCn: 新市长对市政府机构进行了改革。

words.meaning: 亲密的，密切的；私人的，个人的；小圈子内的 至交，密友[ˈintimeit] 暗示，提示，透露｜搭 be intimate with sb. 与某人关系亲密；intimate details 隐私；intimate knowledge of sth. 对…非常了解，熟悉；on intimate terms with sb. 与某人保持亲密关系
words.example: The dance studio provides a smaller, more intimate space, which we use for ballet, modern dance and martial arts.
words.exampleCn: 舞蹈室为我们练习芭蕾、现代舞和武术提供了一个更小更私密的空间。

words.meaning: 限制，约束
words.example: A student loan is not restricted to those who receive a maintenance grant in this school.
words.exampleCn: 在这所学校，学生贷款并不限于那些领生活补助金的学生。

words.meaning: 腰，腰部｜搭 strip to the waist 光着上半身
words.example: Tom tied a walkman recorder to his waist.
words.exampleCn: 汤姆在腰上别了一台随身听。

words.meaning: 质量，才干，能力；口径
words.example: They suggest that the calibre of these institutions be carefully examined.
words.exampleCn: 他们建议要仔细调查这些机构的资质。

words.meaning: 严厉的，严酷的；粗糙的，毛糙的；刻薄的；（天气或生活环境）恶劣的；刺耳的，刺目的｜搭 harsh measures 严厉的措施；a harsh climate 恶劣的气候
words.example: The report has harsh words for the countries that sold these weapons.
words.exampleCn: 这篇报道严厉谴责了出售这些武器的国家。

words.meaning: 议会，国会
words.example: The exhibition met with great opposition from Parliament.
words.exampleCn: 这次展览遭到了国会的强烈反对。

words.meaning: 航班｜搭 flight attendant（客机的）乘务员；flight crew 机组人员；flight path（飞机的）飞行路线
words.example: She's already booked a flight to Queensland.
words.exampleCn: 她已经预订了去昆士兰的航班。

words.meaning: 提醒，使想起；使发生联想｜搭 remind sb. of sth. 提醒，使想起
words.example: The notice reminds students that if they park a motor vehicle on university premises without a valid permit, they will be fined.
words.exampleCn: 这个通知提醒学生们：未经允许就在校园里停放机动车会被罚款。

words.meaning: 养鱼池；玻璃缸；水族馆
words.example: We are going to take the kids to the new aquarium this weekend.
words.exampleCn: 这周末我们打算带孩子们去新开的水族馆。

words.meaning: 细胞；小房间；电池｜搭 blood cells 血细胞
words.example: Scientists are doing cellular research, looking at changes in cells when the body is under stress.
words.exampleCn: 科学家正在进行细胞研究，观察身体在压力下细胞内部发生的变化。

words.meaning: 居住者，居民
words.example: An underground dweller himself, Carpenter has never paid a heating bill, thanks to solar panels and natural insulation.
words.exampleCn: 作为地下居住者，得益于太阳能板和天然的保温条件，卡彭特从未交过取暖费。

words.meaning: 正式宣布；声明；断言
words.example: The government declared that the ballots cast were inconclusive.
words.exampleCn: 政府宣布这次投票不具有决定性。

words.meaning: 手提箱；衣箱
words.example: Tom travelled by plane last week and his suitcase was lost.
words.exampleCn: 汤姆上周坐飞机去旅行，把手提箱弄丢了。

words.meaning: （尤指大学）毕业生；研究生[ˈgræʤueit] （使）毕业；获得学位｜搭 graduate school 研究生院；college graduates 大学毕业生；graduate from 从…毕业
words.example: Nowadays, there are not many job opportunities which graduates can look forward to.
words.exampleCn: 现在，本科毕业生所能期望的就业机会并不多。

words.meaning: 预言；预告
words.example: The United Nations predicts that the global population may stabilise between 8 and 14 billion in the twenty-first century.
words.exampleCn: 联合国预言，在21世纪全球人口将稳定在80亿到140亿之间。

words.meaning: 总部，总公司；大本营；司令部
words.example: The daily paper is compiled at the editorial headquarters.
words.exampleCn: 日报由编辑部总部编纂。

words.meaning: 新闻报道；覆盖范围
words.example: We all watch for live coverage of the results of the bombing trial.
words.exampleCn: 我们都等着看这起爆炸审判结果的现场报道。

words.meaning: 实施，执行；强制，迫使｜搭 enforce laws 执法；enforce a demand 竭力要求
words.example: Do they enforce that rule?
words.exampleCn: 他们执行那条规则了吗？// The teacher did not like to enforce rigid rules on the children. 那个老师不喜欢将陈规旧条强加到孩子们身上。

words.meaning: 特产；特长
words.example: Cross-country skiing events are a specialty of cold- weather countries.
words.exampleCn: 越野滑雪赛事是气候寒冷的国家中一道独特的风景线。

words.meaning: 固有的，内在的；本质的｜搭 intrinsic nature 本质
words.example: Students should realize the intrinsic value of education.
words.exampleCn: 学生应该认识到教育的内在价值。

words.meaning: 医学的，医疗的；内科的｜搭 medical centre 医疗中心；medical science 医学；medical service 医疗服务；family medical history 家族病史
words.example: The injured students required emergent medical attention.
words.exampleCn: 那些受伤的学生急需医疗护理。

words.meaning: 刺，戳；黏贴，黏住；卡住，陷住｜搭 be stuck on 被…迷住，特别喜欢；get stuck 被迷住
words.example: The pictures on the wall were simply stuck on and so could easily become detached.
words.exampleCn: 墙上的画只是被简单地固定住，所以很容易摘下来。

words.meaning: 现实（主义）的，实际的；恰如其分的；逼真的
words.example: We must be more realistic towards the tough problem.
words.exampleCn: 面对这个棘手的问题，我们应该更现实一点。

words.meaning: 冷漠的，不关心的｜搭 be indifferent to 对…漠不关心
words.example: Tina seems to be totally indifferent to the exam result of the higher language course.
words.exampleCn: 蒂娜似乎对高级语言课程的考试结果毫不关心。

words.meaning: 零售商人；复述者，传播者
words.example: Many retailers are facing their slowest business period during the financial crisis.
words.exampleCn: 在金融危机中，许多零售商正处在最低迷时期。

words.meaning: 营业额；人事变动率；货物周转率
words.example: The company tried its best to decrease the turnover.
words.exampleCn: 公司竭尽全力降低人事变动率。

words.meaning: 商标；品牌 铭刻，打烙印于；丑化｜搭 name brand 名牌；leading brand 驰名品牌；brand image 品牌形象；co-branded card 联名卡
words.example: What brand of cola do you like?
words.exampleCn: 你喜欢喝什么牌子的可乐？

words.meaning: 陪伴；伴随，与…同时发生；伴奏｜搭 accompany training 陪练；accompany a singer 伴唱
words.example: Your enrolment form must be accompanied by the course deposit of $100.
words.exampleCn: 你的登记表和100美元的课程押金必须一起上交。

words.meaning: 欺骗；作弊 欺骗；骗子
words.example: Tour operators try to cheat tourists.
words.exampleCn: 旅行社的工作人员试图欺骗游客。

words.meaning: 提及，说起｜搭 not to mention 更不用说；更不必说
words.example: He mentioned in his letter that he might be moving abroad.
words.exampleCn: 他在信中提到他可能要移居国外。

words.meaning: 水平面，水平线；高度，水平；等级 平的，水平的；同高度的，同等程度的；平稳的；冷静的 （使）变平坦｜搭 at the level of 在…水平上
words.example: The noise levels at the site can reach 45 decibels.
words.exampleCn: 在这种场所，噪声值可达45分贝。

words.meaning: 侧面的，旁边的
words.example: Not even our closest relatives among the apes possess such decided lateral asymmetry, as zoologists call it.
words.exampleCn: 正如动物学家所认为的那样，即便是和我们有着最近的血缘关系的猿类也不具备这样明显的侧向不对称性。

words.meaning: 密集的；浓厚的
words.example: The airport was closed because of the dense fog.
words.exampleCn: 机场因为大雾而关闭了。

words.meaning: 闪光，闪耀 闪烁；闪光灯｜搭 a flash of lightning 一道闪电；a flash in the pan 昙花一现的人物，一时的成功
words.example: The air can
words.exampleCn: become slightly positively charged when

words.meaning: 快餐，小吃；点心｜搭 snack bar 小吃店，快餐店
words.example: The sandwich shop for quick snacks is nearby.
words.exampleCn: 出售快餐的三明治店离这很近。

words.meaning: 令人惊奇的；奇特的，非凡的；奇迹般的，不可思议的；绝妙的
words.example: We'll come to a picture gallery where we've got a marvellous collection of paintings all by Australian artists.
words.exampleCn: 接下来我们会来到一个画廊，这里有绝好的画作收藏，全都出自澳大利亚画家之手。

words.meaning: 出口；输出，传播[ˈekspɔ:t] 出口；输出；出口商品｜搭 export rebates 出口退税；export finance 出口信贷；export restriction 出口限制
words.example: In Africa, the feathers of ostriches were used for tribal ceremonial dress and they were also exported to Europe and America.
words.exampleCn: 在非洲鸵鸟毛经常用在部落的典礼服饰上，同时也出口到欧洲和美洲。

words.meaning: 贡品；颂词，称赞；（表示敬意的）礼物
words.example: In ancient times, people had to pay tribute to the king.
words.exampleCn: 在古代，人们必须向国王进贡。

words.meaning: 清洁的；保健的，卫生的 （有卫生设备的）公共厕所｜搭 sanitary facilities 卫生设施；sanitary conditions 卫生条件
words.example: People living in the district suffered from appalling sanitary conditions.
words.exampleCn: 住在这一区域的人们卫生条件差得出奇。

words.meaning: 屈从；提交｜搭 submit to 递交；屈服
words.example: After many failures, I submitted to fate.
words.exampleCn: 多次失败后，我向命运屈服了。

words.meaning: 档案；档案室 存档
words.example: The museum drew on its archive collection for its exhibition.
words.exampleCn: 博物馆为举办展览使用了收藏的档案文件。

words.meaning: 轶话的，轶闻趣事的
words.example: There is only anecdotal evidence of life on Mars.
words.exampleCn: 火星上存在生命仅仅是传言。

words.meaning: 速记法；速记
words.example: The book contained some strange shorthand symbols.
words.exampleCn: 这本书上有一些奇怪的速记符号。

words.meaning: 例外的；异常的
words.example: Kate has quite an exceptional music ability.
words.exampleCn: 凯特具有非凡的音乐才能。

words.meaning: 粗鲁的；粗糙的
words.example: Across the room stand three rude and high-backed chairs.
words.exampleCn: 房间的那头放着三把做工粗糙的高背椅。

words.meaning: （中断后）重新开始，继续恢复
words.example: He resumed his reading after a nap.
words.exampleCn: 小睡了一会儿后，他继续阅读。

words.meaning: 阅书架
words.example: Using a bookrest which raises the material you are reading 45 degrees to the desk will help reduce your chance of a headache.
words.exampleCn: 阅书架可以将阅读材料呈45度地摆放在桌子上，使用它可以降低因阅读引起头疼的几率。

words.meaning: 原始的，上古的；简单的，粗糙的 原始人；原始事物｜搭 primitive society 原始社会；a primitive measuring method原始的测量方法
words.example: Studies of primitive societies suggest that the earliest method of making fire was through friction.
words.exampleCn: 对原始社会的研究表明，人们最早是通过摩擦生火的。

words.meaning: 工艺，手艺；船；航空器
words.example: This region is a diverse agricultural area, rich in historic sites, arts and crafts.
words.exampleCn: 该地区为多种农作物种植带，且具有众多的历史遗址，艺术形式丰富，手工艺发达。

words.meaning: 租用；雇用
words.example: She was hired three years ago.
words.exampleCn: 她是三年前录用的。

words.meaning: 护目镜；风镜；游泳镜
words.example: Racecar drivers all wear goggles when they are in a race.
words.exampleCn: 赛车选手比赛时都佩戴护目镜。

words.meaning: 因此，从而
words.example: Mary became an American citizen, thereby gaining the right to vote.
words.exampleCn: 玛丽成了美国公民，因此得到了投票权。

words.meaning: 桩；火刑柱；利害关系；股份；赌金 以…打赌；拿…冒险｜搭 at stake 在危险中，处于成败关头
words.example: They burned this man at the stake as a heretic.
words.exampleCn: 他们将这个人当作异教徒，对其处以火刑。

words.meaning: 驳船 猛撞；闯｜搭 barge in 闯入；barge into 与…相撞
words.example: Beekeepers moved beehives on barges along the river to their next destination.
words.exampleCn: 养蜂人用驳船载着蜂箱顺流而下，驶往下一个目的地。

words.meaning: 有氧运动
words.example: This room is used mainly for badminton and aerobics.
words.exampleCn: 这间屋子主要用作羽毛球室和有氧运动室。

words.meaning: 灌木｜搭 shrub layer 灌木层
words.example: The volunteers raked around shrubs and trees to look for the lost children.
words.exampleCn: 志愿者在灌木丛和树林里四处寻找迷路的孩子。

words.meaning: 板条，狭板 用板条制作
words.example: Try out an orthopaedic mattress or a spring slatted bed which can be beneficial for certain types of back pain.
words.exampleCn: 你可以尝试使用矫形床垫或是板条弹簧床，这有助于缓解某些背痛。

words.meaning: 法律的；合法的
words.example: The Union has its own officers who can give advice on legal problems.
words.exampleCn: 该协会拥有自己的人员，负责给法律事务提供建议。

words.meaning: 电影摄影术
words.example: The new film provided the raw material for the introduction of cinematography a few years later.
words.exampleCn: 新的电影胶片为几年后电影摄影术的诞生提供了原材料。

words.meaning: 捐赠，捐助；起作用，影响｜搭 contribute to 有助于；捐助，贡献；a contributing factor起作用的因素
words.example: Industrial emissions and automobile exhausts contribute to high pollution.
words.exampleCn: 工业排放物和汽车尾气共同造成了重污染。

words.meaning: 想象（力）；想象出来的事物
words.example: They need to train their powers of imagination.
words.exampleCn: 他们需要训练自己的想象力。

words.meaning: 【医】支气管炎
words.example: Smoking can cause problems such as pneumonia, bronchitis and influenza.
words.exampleCn: 吸烟能引起肺炎、支气管炎和流行性感冒等疾病。

words.meaning: 恶化，加剧
words.example: More intensive farming and the abandonment of fallow periods tend to exacerbate soil erosion.
words.exampleCn: 更密集的耕种和取消休耕期会加剧土壤的侵蚀。

words.meaning: 闯入；打搅；侵扰
words.example: In fact, there are people who dislike any kind of perfume and think it's an intrusion.
words.exampleCn: 实际上，有些人讨厌所有香水的气味，并认为别人使用香水是对自己的侵犯。

words.meaning: 取消，废除；抵消，对消；删去，划掉｜搭 cancel out 抵偿
words.example: Could you please call the dentist at 816-25285 and cancel the appointment for me?
words.exampleCn: 你能拨打816-25285帮我取消和牙医的预约吗？

words.meaning: 软木塞 用软木塞塞住
words.example: When a volcano erupts, the shattered summit is ejected like a cork from a shaken soda bottle.
words.exampleCn: 火山喷发时，被炸碎的山峰喷射而出，就像是装有苏打水的瓶子经过摇晃，上面的软木塞被顶飞出去一样。

words.meaning: 数据；资料
words.example: You have to spend a bit of time making the data a lot clearer.
words.exampleCn: 你要花一点时间把这些数据整理得更清晰些。

words.meaning: 水牛；（北美）野牛
words.example: The Native Americans followed the wounded buffalo until it fell dead.
words.exampleCn: 这些印第安人紧追这头受伤的水牛不放，直到它倒地死去。

words.meaning: 不足的，不够的｜搭 insufficient for 不够做…；不能胜任…
words.example: The company's funds for research were insufficient.
words.exampleCn: 那家公司没有足够的研究资金。

words.meaning: 杂货店；食品，杂货
words.example: I assisted in a grocery store last semester.
words.exampleCn: 上学期，我在一家杂货店帮忙。

words.meaning: 湿的，潮湿的，湿润的，多潮气的｜搭 humid air 潮湿的空气；humid atmosphere 潮湿的大气；humid climate 湿润的气候
words.example: Summers in that city are extremely hot and humid.
words.exampleCn: 那个城市的夏天非常湿热。

words.meaning: 关系，联系；亲属，亲戚｜搭 in/with relation to 关系到；have no relation to 与…没有关系；diplomatic relations 外交关系；international relations 国际关系
words.example: The relation between students and teachers is generally good in this university.
words.exampleCn: 这所大学里师生间的关系总体来说很好。

words.meaning: 使混乱，混淆；使迷惑，使糊涂｜搭 confuse...with 把…和…混淆，把…和…混为一谈
words.example: I'm afraid I'm a bit confused by what you said just now.
words.exampleCn: 恐怕我被你刚才说的话弄得有点糊涂。

words.meaning: 通信，信件；符合，一致；对应｜搭 keep correspondence with sb. 与某人保持通信；commercial correspondence 商业信函
words.example: I have kept correspondence with my former classmates.
words.exampleCn: 我一直和以前的同学保持通信。

words.meaning: 配给，分配，安置；配给量
words.example: People approved the allocation of food to those who need it most.
words.exampleCn: 人们赞成把食物分给那些最需要的人。

words.meaning: 招待，款待；娱乐（业）；供消遣的事物｜搭 the entertainment industry 娱乐产业
words.example: The use of some entertainment can be addicted.
words.exampleCn: 参与一些娱乐项目是会上瘾的。

words.meaning: 征服，战胜，占领；克服，破除（坏习惯等）｜搭 conquer your fear 战胜恐惧
words.example: Many people have made attempts to conquer the peaks of Everest.
words.exampleCn: 许多人都试图征服珠穆朗玛峰。

words.meaning: 装饰，装潢；装饰品｜搭 for decoration 具有装饰功能
words.example: The restaurant will offer decoration balloons.
words.exampleCn: 餐厅会提供装饰气球。

words.meaning: 奖赏；报酬 酬谢；奖励
words.example: Those employees who never take sick leave think that they should be rewarded.
words.exampleCn: 那些从来不请病假的员工认为他们应该因此得到奖励。

words.meaning: [pl. larvae]幼虫，幼体
words.example: Once the beetle larvae have finished pupation, the residue is a first-rate source of fertiliser.
words.exampleCn: 一旦甲虫的幼虫完成了化蛹过程，其残留物就是最好的肥料来源。

words.meaning: 学期
words.example: In the first semester, you'll be taking four subjects.
words.exampleCn: 你在第一学期要选四门课。

words.meaning: 子女，后代；产物
words.example: With one right- and one left-handed parent, 15 to 20 percent of the offspring will be left-handed.
words.exampleCn: 如果父母中有一个是左撇子，另一个惯用右手，那么他们的后代是左撇子的概率是15％到20％。

words.meaning: 偶尔的，间或发生的
words.example: There will be occasional congruity between prophecy and fact.
words.exampleCn: 预言与事实偶尔会一致。

words.meaning: 火山口；坑
words.example: After the volcano erupted, lava domes formed inside the new crater, and have periodically burst.
words.exampleCn: 火山喷发后，新形成的火山口内部会形成熔岩穹丘，这些熔岩穹丘会周期性地爆发。

words.meaning: 继而发生；接着发生
words.example: If a forest fire cannot be extinguished, devastation is sure to ensue.
words.exampleCn: 如果不能扑灭森林火灾，毁坏一定会随之发生。

words.meaning: 教导；指示，命令
words.example: PE teachers instruct students how to exercise, play sports, and do other recreational activities correctly and safely.
words.exampleCn: 体育老师指导学生们如何安全正确地锻炼、做运动以及进行其他娱乐活动。

words.meaning: 宣布；宣言，声明（书）
words.example: This declaration seemed to calm the discontented party members somewhat.
words.exampleCn: 这项声明似乎让那些心存不满的党派成员稍微平静了点。

words.meaning: 柔韧，有弹性；柔顺，温顺；灵活性；适应性｜搭 flexibility of mind 头脑的灵活性
words.example: PE teachers help the development of coordination, balance, posture, and flexibility with activities like simple catching and throwing.
words.exampleCn: 体育老师利用简单抓取和投掷等活动帮助学生提高身体的协调性、平衡度以及改善他们的体态和柔韧性。

words.meaning: 当地（人）的 本地人，本国人
words.example: All teachers in this school have specialist qualifications in teaching English to foreign students, and are all native speakers.
words.exampleCn: 这所学校所有的老师都具备教外籍学生英语的专业资格，且均为英语国家人士。

words.meaning: 有意义的；重大的，重要的
words.example: Modifications to houses come at a significant cost to the home buyers.
words.exampleCn: 房屋装修对购房人来说是一笔不菲的开销。

words.meaning: 忠诚，忠心｜搭 national loyalty 对国家的忠诚
words.example: In the remote area, family and loyalties are still very important.
words.exampleCn: 在偏远地区，家庭和忠诚仍然很重要。

words.meaning: 护发素，护发剂；调节物；调节器，调节装置｜搭 soil conditioner 土壤调节剂；air conditioner 空调
words.example: If your hair is dry in winter, you can use some hair conditioner every day.
words.exampleCn: 如果头发在冬天时干燥，可以每天用一些护发素。

words.meaning: 减少，缩小；简化
words.example: Catastrophes such as fire, flood, drought or epidemic may reduce population sizes to a small fraction of their average level.
words.exampleCn: 火灾、洪水、干旱或流行病之类大灾难会降低人口数量，使其远远低于正常水平。

words.meaning: 争论，辩论，论战
words.example: There exists a controversy over a plan for new teaching building.
words.exampleCn: 建造新教学楼的计划存在争议。

words.meaning: 服务，帮助；公共设施，公用事业；维修，保养；行政部门，服务机构 维修，保养｜搭 airline coach service 航空公司汽车服务处；Student Service 学生服务中心；door-to-door service 门到门服务；service charge 服务费用；interlibrary service 图书馆馆际服务
words.example: The airline companies want to improve the service.
words.exampleCn: 航空公司想提升服务质量。

words.meaning: 居住，栖身
words.example: This kind of ground-dwelling herbivore may go extinct within a decade.
words.exampleCn: 这种穴居食草动物也许在十年内就会灭绝。

words.meaning: （感官的）感觉能力；感觉，知觉；轰动，引起轰动的事件（或人物）｜搭 cause a great sensation 引起很大轰动；heat sensation 热觉
words.example: This discovery would cause not much more sensation than Herschel's discovery of Uranus, in 1781.
words.exampleCn: 这一发现的影响不会比赫舍尔于1781年首次发现天王星时更轰动。

words.meaning: 碎屑 废弃；抛弃
words.example: Scrapping farm-price support and protection for coal- mining offers a two-fold bonus: a cleaner environment and a more efficient economy.
words.exampleCn: 废除农产品价格补贴和对采煤业的保护有双重好处，可以获得更清洁的环境和更高效的经济。

words.meaning: 渴望的；忧虑的
words.example: He is anxious to enter the competition.
words.exampleCn: 他急切希望能加入比赛。

words.meaning: 接受者
words.example: This aritificial heart recipient will recover in three weeks.
words.exampleCn: 人造心脏接受者将在三个星期后康复。

words.meaning: 完全相同的，同一的
words.example: Even among identical twins, one in six pairs will differ in their handedness.
words.exampleCn: 即使是同卵双胞胎，平均六对中也会出现一对在使用左右手习惯上不同的双胞胎。

words.meaning: 泥土，黏土｜搭 clay pigeon 泥制飞靶；容易被捉弄的人
words.example: The ancient Egyptians moved clay hives, probably on rafts, down the Nile to follow the bloom.
words.exampleCn: 古埃及人带着泥制的蜂箱，可能是乘着筏子，沿尼罗河而下去寻找花源。

words.meaning: 竞争者，竞争对手；可与匹敌的人（或物） 竞争的，对抗的vt. 与…竞争；与…匹敌，比得上；竞争，对抗
words.example: The rival team lost by 12 points in the first round.
words.exampleCn: 第一轮比赛中，对手队以12分之差败北。

words.meaning: 对流层的｜搭 tropospheric ozone 对流层臭氧
words.example: Scientists study tropospheric ozone to understand air pollution near the ground.
words.exampleCn: 科学家研究对流层臭氧，以了解地面附近的空气污染。

words.meaning: 爱慕，吸引；吸引力；具有吸引力的事（或人）｜搭 a tourist attraction 旅游胜地
words.example: The attraction of single-speed cycles is their simplicity and reliability.
words.exampleCn: 单速自行车吸引人之处在于其简单性和可靠性。

words.meaning: 土方（工程）
words.example: Some contemporary tribes still live among the earthworks of earlier cultures.
words.exampleCn: 一些同时代的部落依然生活在早期文化风格的建筑里。

words.meaning: 围绕；包围｜搭 be surrounded by sth. 被…围绕；surround yourself with sth. 用…把自己包围住
words.example: We have surrounded this city.
words.exampleCn: 我们已经包围了这座城市。

words.meaning: 印象，感想；印记，压痕｜搭 first impression 第一印象
words.example: Could you tell us something about your first impression of the town when you arrived?
words.exampleCn: 你能不能告诉我当你初到这个小镇时，你的第一印象是什么？

words.meaning: 使恐惧，使惊骇；使震惊；使感到厌恶
words.example: I had been horrified by several newspaper reports.
words.exampleCn: 我对几篇新闻报道的内容感到震惊。

words.meaning: 介绍；传入，引进；导言，绪论
words.example: By way of introduction, I shall give you the background of the subject.
words.exampleCn: 通过介绍，我将向你讲述该学科的相关背景。

words.meaning: 紧密的，结实的；简明的；紧凑的 使紧凑，压缩｜搭 a compact car 小型客车；a compact narration 简明的叙述
words.example: The bag must be compact and light for easy transport.
words.exampleCn: 这个包必须轻便结实以便于运输。

words.meaning: 打听，询问；查问，调查
words.example: If you have any question, welcome to call the Students' Union to enquire.
words.exampleCn: 有任何问题，欢迎致电学生会询问。

words.meaning: 向前地，前进地｜搭 from...onwards 从（某时）起一直
words.example: The Romans left from the country in 410, at the beginning of the fifth century, and from then onwards the country suffered a series of invasions.
words.exampleCn: 罗马人在公元410年，也就是五世纪初撤离该国，之后，这个国家遭受了一系列的侵略。

words.meaning: 备忘录，摘要
words.example: The manager sent a memorandum to remind everyone of the meeting time.
words.exampleCn: 经理发了一份备忘录，提醒大家开会的时间。

words.meaning: 长方形的，矩形的
words.example: In front of the Empire State Building is a long rectangular wading pool.
words.exampleCn: 帝国大厦前面是一个长方形的浅水池。

words.meaning: 肾，肾脏
words.example: The doctor asked Mark whether he had ever suffered from any liver, kidney or heart disease.
words.exampleCn: 医生问马克以前是否得过肝、肾或是心脏方面的疾病。

words.meaning: 立场；观点
words.example: From a completely economical standpoint, the ad is actually more important than the film itself.
words.exampleCn: 单以经济学观点看，这则广告实际上比电影本身更重要。

words.meaning: 有疗效的；医疗的
words.example: The doctor believed in the curative power of rest and fresh air.
words.exampleCn: 医生相信休息和新鲜空气的治疗作用。

words.meaning: 主要地；重要地；显著地
words.example: Tom grew up in the predominantly black, middle-class suburb of this city.
words.exampleCn: 汤姆在这个城市黑人和中产阶级占多数的市郊长大。

words.meaning: 离合器；[常 pl.]控制 企图抓；抓紧
words.example: The driver released the clutch to engage the gears and make his car go.
words.exampleCn: 司机松开离合器，挂上挡，这样汽车就开动起来了。

words.meaning: 联合，结合｜搭 combine...with... 联合…和…
words.example: The next step was to combine the holder with a small camera.
words.exampleCn: 下一步是将支架和一台小型相机连接起来。

words.meaning: 图，图表；海图 记录；用图表表示；制图｜搭 bar chart 条形图；flow chart 流程图
words.example: The first chart shows the reasons why adults decide to study.
words.exampleCn: 第一张图表显示成年人决定进行学习的原因。

words.meaning: 哮喘症
words.example: A world-wide rise in asthma, over the past four decades is said to be linked with increased air pollution.
words.exampleCn: 据说，在过去的40年里，世界范围内哮喘病发病率升高与越来越严重的空气污染有关。

words.meaning: 签名，签字；签署
words.example: Corbett ran into the bedroom and scribbled his signature on the notebook.
words.exampleCn: 科比特冲进卧室，在笔记本上潦草地签上了自己的名字。

words.meaning: 时刻，时候；场合；重大（或特殊）活动，盛会；时机，机会；起因，理由 引起，惹起
words.example: It should have been an occasion for rejoicing, but she could not feel any real joy.
words.exampleCn: 原本应该是高兴的时刻，她却丝毫未感到真正的快乐。

words.meaning: 矿物，矿石
words.example: Topaz is a hard and transparent mineral.
words.exampleCn: 黄玉是一种坚硬透明的矿石。

words.meaning: 无价的
words.example: Her advice was invaluable to me when I started learning English.
words.exampleCn: 在我开始学英语时，她的建议对我非常宝贵。

words.meaning: 重新获得，重新得到；使复原，使康复；收回，换回｜搭 recover oneself 使自己振作；recover from 恢复
words.example: After a few days of cough, my roommate began to recover.
words.exampleCn: 咳嗽了几天后，我的室友开始康复了。

words.meaning: 温和，中庸；适度，合理｜搭 in moderation 节制
words.example: In the middle of Health Diet Pyramid we find the things that we can eat in moderation.
words.exampleCn: 我们可以适量吃处于健康饮食金字塔中部的食物。

words.meaning: 文件证据，文献资料，文件
words.example: When you open a bank account, you should take some documentation with you.
words.exampleCn: 当你去银行开户时，要随身携带一些文件资料。

words.meaning: 批评的，评论的；危急的，紧要的；临界的；挑剔的｜搭 be critical of 对…吹毛求疵；critical thoughts 批判性思维；be of critical importance 至关重要；critical point 临界点；a critical period 危险期
words.example: The strike has been stopped, but the situation is still critical at the moment.
words.exampleCn: 罢工虽然停止了，但是当前形势仍很危急。

words.meaning: 职业的，业务的
words.example: This is a vocational training institute.
words.exampleCn: 这是一个职业培训机构。

words.meaning: 摘要，概要 概括的，简略的｜搭 in summary 总括
words.example: Tina gave a summary of the activity last night.
words.exampleCn: 蒂娜昨晚给出了活动的概要。

words.meaning: 排除，消除；搬迁，移动；开除，解除 距离，间距｜搭 be far removed from sth. 和…差别很大
words.example: Water soluble vitamins are removed rapidly from the body.
words.exampleCn: 水溶性维生素可以很快排出体外。

words.meaning: 保险箱
words.example: The thief managed to open the coffer, but it turned out to be empty.
words.exampleCn: 小偷费尽心思打开了保险箱，却发现里面空空如也。

words.meaning: 负有义务的；一定的，必然的
words.example: Because these courses start every Monday, there's bound to be one that fits in with your academic, personal or professional commitments.
words.exampleCn: 因为这些课程每周一都开，所以一定有适合你学习、针对你个人或工作内容的课程。

words.meaning: 水银
words.example: The mercury in the thermometer rose to 35℃ yesterday.
words.exampleCn: 昨天温度计的水银柱升到了35摄氏度。

words.meaning: 小装饰品；不值钱的珠宝
words.example: The lady had some trinkets on her dress.
words.exampleCn: 这位女士在衣服上挂了一些饰品。

words.meaning: 期满；终止
words.example: The lease on this house expires at the end of the year.
words.exampleCn: 这房子租约年底到期。

words.meaning: 能接近的；易达到的
words.example: He pointed his telescope to every accessible part of the sky and recorded what he saw.
words.exampleCn: 他将望远镜指向天空中所有可以达到的地方，并记录下所看到的。

words.meaning: 涡轮机，汽轮机
words.example: Ultraclean coal can be used in advanced power systems such as coal-fired gas turbines.
words.exampleCn: 超纯煤可以用在诸如燃煤的燃气涡轮机之类的先进动力系统中。

words.meaning: 脊椎；骨干；支柱
words.example: The Ottawa Charter for Health Promotion outlined in 1986 remains as the backbone of health action today.
words.exampleCn: 1986年起草的《渥太华健康促进宪章》仍是今天健康活动的支柱。

words.meaning: 把…归于[ˈætribju:t] 属性；品质｜搭 attribute to 归结于，归功于，因为
words.example: The global increase in greenhouse gases has been attributed to industrial pollution in developed countries.
words.exampleCn: 全球温室气体的增加归咎于发达国家的工业污染。

words.meaning: 广大，巨大；重要，重要性；星体的亮度
words.example: Stargazers were struck by the uncommon magnitude of the newly discovered comet.
words.exampleCn: 这颗新发现的彗星尤其亮，令天文学家们非常吃惊。

words.meaning: 兼容的；合得来的｜搭 be compatible with 与…相适应／不矛盾
words.example: Accuracy is not always compatible with haste.
words.exampleCn: 忙中难免出错。

words.meaning: 企业家；承包人
words.example: The owner of the company is an American entrepreneur.
words.exampleCn: 这家公司的老板是一位美国企业家。

words.meaning: 提议，建议；求婚
words.example: The school master has accepted proposals to renovate the old schoolhouses.
words.exampleCn: 校长已经接受了翻新旧校舍的提议。

words.meaning: 教练；指导；长途汽车 训练；辅导
words.example: They play just as important a role as the coach in our team.
words.exampleCn: 在我们队里，他们扮演着和教练同等重要的角色。

words.meaning: 致命的；重大的；命中注定的；灾难性的｜搭 a fatal accident 一场严重的事故
words.example: The majority of single-gene defects are fatal.
words.exampleCn: 大部分的单基因缺陷都是致命的。

words.meaning: 货币；通用，流行｜搭 paper currency 纸币
words.example: The paper currency of the United States is green and white.
words.exampleCn: 美国的纸币由绿色和白色组成。// Many good words just have no currency these days and are useless in conversation. 许多很好的词现在都不太流行，而且交谈中也用不到。

words.meaning: 不赞成，反对
words.example: They disapprove of paying farmers for not cultivating the land.
words.exampleCn: 他们不赞成付钱给未耕种土地的农民。

words.meaning: 抱怨；投诉｜搭 complain about 抱怨
words.example: John complains that the resource centre has limited opening hours.
words.exampleCn: 约翰抱怨说信息中心的开放时间有限。

words.meaning: 大胆的；有冒险精神的；鲁莽的；厚颜无耻的｜搭 audacious spirit 冒险精神
words.example: The audacious proposal was quickly denied by the committee.
words.exampleCn: 这个冒险的提议很快就被委员会否决了。

words.meaning: 使中断；扰乱
words.example: Work of any company may be disrupted by absence of its employees.
words.exampleCn: 任何一家公司的工作都可能因员工的旷工而中断。

words.meaning: 跋涉；踩踏 长途跋涉
words.example: Those poor people tramped for miles and miles without finding anywhere to stay.
words.exampleCn: 那些可怜的人走啊走，始终找不到栖身之处。

words.meaning: 害虫
words.example: Some varieties of food plants are especially vulnerable to pests or diseases.
words.exampleCn: 一些粮食作物尤其容易受害虫和疾病的危害。

words.meaning: 通货膨胀
words.example: Inflation reduced the purchasing power of the families.
words.exampleCn: 通货膨胀降低了家庭的购买力。

words.meaning: 陈述；声明；报表
words.example: The statement contradicts the views of the writer.
words.exampleCn: 这些陈述与作者的观点相反。

words.meaning: 总额 合计｜搭 amount of 许多；amount to 总计…
words.example: The chart shows the amount spent on six consumer goods in European countries.
words.exampleCn: 这张图表显示了欧洲国家在六种消费品上的总花费。

words.meaning: 规定的，特定的；假设的
words.example: It is often important that you make it clear what your particular role is at a given time.
words.exampleCn: 明确自己在特定时间内的特定角色通常很重要。

words.meaning: 先进的
words.example: Prehistoric Amazonians developed technology and art that were advanced for their time.
words.exampleCn: 史前亚马孙人创造了当时先进的技术和艺术。

words.meaning: 里程碑；转折点
words.example: This theory represents one of the great milestones in the history of scientific thought.
words.exampleCn: 这一理论是科学思想史上一座伟大的里程碑。

words.meaning: 曲柄，曲轴 用曲柄转动某物
words.example: That gear is connected to a crank which changes the motion.
words.exampleCn: 那个传动装置与一个能改变运动方式的曲柄连接在一起。

words.meaning: 词典编纂者
words.example: The reform has transformed the way lexicographers work.
words.exampleCn: 这种改革改变了词典编纂者的工作方式。

words.meaning: 群，伙；束，串，捆 集中，挤在一起；使成一束（或一群等）｜搭 a bunch of 一些
words.example: He picked me a bunch of flowers.
words.exampleCn: 他给我采了一束花。

words.meaning: 戏装；（特定场合穿的）成套服装
words.example: Mom told me that she had a ballet costume.
words.exampleCn: 妈妈告诉我她有一套芭蕾舞服。

words.meaning: 惊恐，恐慌 吓，使害怕；受惊吓，感到害怕
words.example: The decoy camera can be fixed to the wall to scare off burglars.
words.exampleCn: 可以在墙上安装假摄像头来吓走盗贼。

words.meaning: 应付，处理；操纵，控制；影响
words.example: Computers are very efficient at manipulating information.
words.exampleCn: 计算机在处理信息方面效率极高。

words.meaning: 少年的，少年特有的；幼稚的，不成熟的 未成年人，少年
words.example: Juvenile delinquency has increased remarkably in the last decade.
words.exampleCn: 在过去的十年里，未成年人犯罪有明显的增加。

words.meaning: 现象，迹象；非凡的人（或事物）
words.example: The greenhouse effect is a natural phenomenon.
words.exampleCn: 温室效应是一种自然现象。

words.meaning: 货物 运送（货物）；货运
words.example: Heavy freight could only be carried by water or rail.
words.exampleCn: 大型货物只能通过水路或铁路来运输。

words.meaning: 易受攻击的，易受伤的｜搭 be vulnerable to 易受…伤害；vulnerable group 弱势群体
words.example: Women are especially vulnerable to back pain because of pregnancy.
words.exampleCn: 由于怀孕，女性尤其容易背痛。

words.meaning: （蒸）汽，汽雾 发出蒸汽；（火车、轮船）行驶；用蒸汽开动｜搭 steam engine 蒸汽机
words.example: The old train is powered by steam engine.
words.exampleCn: 老式火车由蒸汽机驱动。

words.meaning: 贵重的，有价值的 贵重物品，财宝｜搭 valuable belongings 贵重的财产
words.example: The province is abundant in valuable minerals.
words.exampleCn: 该省富含贵重的矿物质。

words.meaning: 推测起来，大概
words.example: Presumably consumers have bought such poisonous food.
words.exampleCn: 大概消费者已经购买了这种有毒食品。

words.meaning: 圣堂，圣殿，圣坛；圣地；庇护所，避难所；禁猎区，动物保护区｜搭 bird sanctuary 鸟类保护区；wildlife sanctuary 野生动植物保护区；seek sanctuary 寻找避难所
words.example: Despite living in a sanctuary, which makes them safe from hunters, the animals still face a number of problems that threaten their survival.
words.exampleCn: 尽管生活在保护区，得以远离猎人，这些动物仍然面临很多威胁它们生存的问题。

words.meaning: 算术
words.example: My little brother is good at arithmetic and can add numbers quickly.
words.exampleCn: 我弟弟擅长算术，能很快地加法计算。

words.meaning: 要求；请求
words.example: I'd like to make a request for leave.
words.exampleCn: 我想请求离开一下。

words.meaning: 飞奔，猛冲；猛掷；使破灭，使沮丧 飞奔，猛冲；破折号；精力，干劲
words.example: I dashed off the letter.
words.exampleCn: 我急急忙忙地把信写完了。

words.meaning: 治疗；对待
words.example: People were dissatisfied with the treatment of animals at the zoo.
words.exampleCn: 动物园对待动物的方式令人不满。

words.meaning: 粗的；粗糙的；粗劣的
words.example: It's good for you to walk on the coarse sand with bare feet.
words.exampleCn: 光脚在粗沙上走动对你有好处。

words.meaning: 不安全的，不可靠的｜搭 an insecure investment 一笔不可靠的投资
words.example: The trend towards blurring these roles in dress is probably democratic, but it also makes some people very insecure.
words.exampleCn: 淡化服饰角色的趋势或许比较民主，但同时也让一些人觉得很不安全。

words.meaning: 亚麻织品；亚麻布
words.example: All bed linens and towels are clearly embossed with the name of the manufacturer.
words.exampleCn: 所有的床上用品和毛巾上都清楚地压印了生产商的名字。

words.meaning: 启示，灵感；鼓舞人心的人（或事），激励
words.example: Hypotheses arise from guesswork, or from inspiration.
words.exampleCn: 假说由人们的猜测或灵感引起。

words.meaning: 慷慨的；大量的｜搭 a generous gift 一份慷慨的礼物
words.example: People in disaster-affected areas received generous aid from the government.
words.exampleCn: 受灾地区的人民从政府那里得到了大量的救济物资。

words.meaning: 种植；培养
words.example: This banana is the first type to be cultivated here.
words.exampleCn: 这种香蕉是这里最早种植的品种。

words.meaning: 参加活动；作战 战役；活动｜搭 launch a campaign 发起活动；campaign funds 竞选经费
words.example: Local authorities in London campaigned to be allowed to enforce anti-pollution laws themselves.
words.exampleCn: 伦敦当地政权发起一场要求赋予他们执行反污染法案权力的运动。

words.meaning: 混乱；失调，紊乱，疾病
words.example: The couple knew through the examination that they would have a baby free from the disorder.
words.exampleCn: 通过检查，这对夫妇知道自己会生一个健康的宝宝。

words.meaning: 认出，发现；看见，注意到 地点，处所；斑点，污点；少量｜搭 on the spot 当场，在现场；hot spot 热点；a scenic spot景点
words.example: You'll spot the cinema right next to the underground station.
words.exampleCn: 你会在地铁站旁边看到这家电影院。

words.meaning: 结果，成果；后果；结局；出口，输出量
words.example: Some environmentalists worry about this outcome.
words.exampleCn: 一些环境保护主义者对这个结果表示担心。

words.meaning: 恶化，加重，加剧｜搭 aggravate poverty 加重贫困；aggravate the situation 使环境恶化
words.example: The pollution problems in the area will be further aggravated by the heavy industry.
words.exampleCn: 重工业的发展将使该地区的污染问题进一步恶化。

words.meaning: 欺骗；诡计｜搭 intentional deception 故意的欺骗行为
words.example: The young boy didn't have the courage to admit his deception.
words.exampleCn: 那个男孩没有勇气承认他的欺骗行为。

words.meaning: 削尖，磨快；使敏锐，使敏捷｜搭 sharpen pencils 削铅笔
words.example: The course can help the students sharpen their oral skills.
words.exampleCn: 这门课程可以帮助学生们练就流利的口语表达能力。

words.meaning: 实际的，实用的；实践的，应用的｜搭 practical experience 实践经验；practical value 实用价值；practical material 实用材料
words.example: The new invention was very practical.
words.exampleCn: 这项新发明很实用。

words.meaning: （指人或思想）容易受影响的；顺从的；易弯的，柔韧的
words.example: This pair of shoes are made of pliable leather.
words.exampleCn: 这双鞋是用软皮做的。

words.meaning: 处理，处置；布置，安排｜搭 waste disposal 废物处理；at one's disposal 任某人处理，供某人支配
words.example: The main use of water in most families is washing and waste disposal.
words.exampleCn: 在大多数家庭中，水的主要用途是洗漱和废物处理。

words.meaning: 子公司；附属机构；支流 次要的；辅助的，附设的｜搭 subsidiary unit 从属单位；a subsidiary company 分公司
words.example: Ports attract many subsidiaries and independent industries.
words.exampleCn: 港口城市吸引了很多附属公司和独立产业。

words.meaning: 十分小心的，谨慎的
words.example: We should be more cautious not to make any mistakes in our papers.
words.exampleCn: 我们要更加小心以避免在试卷上出现任何错误。

words.meaning: 样式；模式 构成图案；使形成，促成
words.example: How do you think the Internet will affect buying patterns in the future?
words.exampleCn: 你认为互联网会如何影响未来的购买模式？

words.meaning: 地形，地势
words.example: Five speed bicycles are best suited to riding over long distances or hilly terrain.
words.exampleCn: 五档位变速自行车最适用于长途旅行或者崎岖多山的地形。

words.meaning: 暗室
words.example: Plate cameras were heavy, and required access to a darkroom for loading and processing the plates.
words.exampleCn: 感光相机很重，而且还需要一间暗室来装载和处理使用过的底片。

words.meaning: 跪
words.example: Mary knelt down to examine the damage to her car.
words.exampleCn: 玛丽跪下来仔细查看她汽车的受损情况。

words.meaning: 征服；淹没
words.example: The village was overwhelmed by the flood.
words.exampleCn: 那个村庄被洪水淹没了。

words.meaning: 轻视，鄙视，不尊重；蔑视
words.example: The officer's tone of voice towards the stowaway was loaded with contempt.
words.exampleCn: 警官对偷渡者说话的语气充满了轻蔑。

words.meaning: 认出；承认，认可｜搭 be recognized as sth. 被认为某物
words.example: Companies should recognize that their employees are a significant part of their financial assets.
words.exampleCn: 公司应该认识到雇员是其金融资产的重要组成部分。

words.meaning: 徽章；标记；象征
words.example: Are there any marks or badges on your briefcase that make it stand out?
words.exampleCn: 你的公文包上是否有什么记号或标记能让它区别于其他公文包？

words.meaning: 经济的；经济上的，经济学的｜搭 economic climate 经济形势，经济气候
words.example: They encouraged farmers to use greater quantities of fertilizers than are needed to get the highest economic crop yield.
words.exampleCn: 他们鼓励农民使用远远超过作物实际所需量的化肥，以获得最高的经济作物产量。

words.meaning: 虚弱的；无效的
words.example: I felt feeble when I was ill.
words.exampleCn: 我生病的时候感到很虚弱。

words.meaning: 美德；优点｜搭 by/in virtue of 凭借，依靠
words.example: The virtue of job descriptions is that they lessen role ambiguity.
words.exampleCn: 工作描述的优点是能减少角色模糊性。

words.meaning: 纤维
words.example: Today fibre optics are used to obtain a clearer image of smaller objects than ever before—even viruses.
words.exampleCn: 现在人们利用纤维光学来获取更小物体的画面，其清晰程度前所未有，甚至病毒的图像都很清楚。

words.meaning: 郊区
words.example: The hotel in Sydney's southern suburbs is the closest to Sydney Airport.
words.exampleCn: 位于悉尼南郊的这家酒店是距悉尼机场最近的酒店。

words.meaning: 碾磨成粉，粉碎
words.example: Pulverised rock will climb as a dust cloud into the atmosphere.
words.exampleCn: 石粉会像尘雾一样上升到大气中。

words.meaning: 使肥沃，使多产；施肥于；使受精｜搭 fertilised eggs 受精卵；cross-fertilise 异花受精
words.example: Mature breeding birds are very expensive—even a fertilised ostrich egg isn't cheap.
words.exampleCn: 这种鸟的成鸟很贵，甚至一个受精的鸵鸟蛋都不便宜。

words.meaning: 配给量，定量；给养，口粮 配给，定量供应｜搭 the weekly meat ration 每周的食肉量；be on ration 定量

words.exampleCn: 战争期间，鸡蛋都实行定量供应。

words.meaning: 债，债务｜搭 be in debt 欠债，欠情；in debt to sb./in one's debt 欠某人的债
words.example: The freshman misconducted his expenditure so he's deep in debt.
words.exampleCn: 这名大一新生没有合理地规划开销，所以债台高筑。

words.meaning: 吸引的，有吸引力的；引起注意的｜搭 an attractive offer 有吸引力的工作；attractive personality 有魅力的个性
words.example: My landlord is a slender attractive woman in her mid- thirties.
words.exampleCn: 我的房东35岁，身材苗条，魅力四射。

words.meaning: 征服；战利品｜搭 military conquest 军事征服
words.example: The king completed the conquest of the country.
words.exampleCn: 国王彻底征服了那个国家。

words.meaning: 久经世故的人；精通者
words.example: Susan isn't the sophisticate that her classmates imagine her to be.
words.exampleCn: 苏珊并不像她的同学们想的那样是个久经世故的人。

words.meaning: 咔嚓折断，啪地绷断；（啪的一声）打开（或关上）；咬；厉声说话，怒声责斥 咔嚓声 突然的，匆忙的｜搭 snap out 厉声说出；snap up 迅速抓住；抢购

words.exampleCn: 暴风雪折断了树枝和电线。

words.meaning: 表达，表示 特快的，快速的；明确的 快车，快运，快递
words.example: The chart on the wall expresses the economic movements differently from the last year.
words.exampleCn: 墙上的这张图表反映了经济趋势与去年的不同。

words.meaning: 可辨认的，可识别的；可确定的，可证明是同一的｜搭 identifiable characteristics 可识别的特征
words.example: The bird is easily identifiable by its bright red feathers.
words.exampleCn: 这种鸟有鲜红的羽毛，很容易辨认。

words.meaning: 名义上的；（金额、租金等）微不足道的｜搭 nominal head 名义上的领导；nominal assets 名义资产；nominal fee 很少的费用
words.example: The bonus to employees is merely a nominal sum.
words.exampleCn: 雇员们只得到了一笔象征性的奖金。

words.meaning: 取得，获得

words.exampleCn: 在进化的过程中，猴子未能获得语言能力。

words.meaning: 笔迹学，笔相学
words.example: Graphology is not a good predictor of future job performance.
words.exampleCn: 笔相学并不是预测未来工作成就的好方法。

words.meaning: 注册，登记；登记表 注册，登记｜搭 registered capital 注册资本；register a trademark 注册一个商标；register for 登记参加，报名参加；register with 向…登

words.meaning: 极端地；非常地

words.exampleCn: 长时间的烈日曝晒和炙热的风使澳大利亚的蒸发率极高。

words.meaning: 腐烂 （使）腐烂
words.example: Root rot is a serious problem in such a situation.
words.exampleCn: 在这种情况下根部腐烂是一个很严重的问题。

words.meaning: 救护车；野战医院
words.example: There is a car accident, please send an ambulance as soon as possible.
words.exampleCn: 这里发生了一起车祸，请尽快派救护车来。

words.meaning: 悲惨的，痛苦的；令人难受的｜搭 as miserable as sin 非常悲惨；a miserable failure 可悲的失败
words.example: Many female patients have completely given up exercise because the pain makes them so miserable.
words.exampleCn: 很多女病人已经完全放弃了锻炼，因为疼痛让她们极其痛苦。

words.meaning: 连续的，不断的｜搭 continuous flow 持续气流；continuous performance cinema循环场电影院
words.example: There's a continuous video showing today about the voyages of Captain Cook.
words.exampleCn: 今日将连续放映有关库克船长航海的录像。

words.meaning: 分开，分隔；分配，分享；除（以） 分歧，差异；分界线，分水岭｜搭 divide into 分成；divide sth. from sth. 把某物和某物分开

words.exampleCn: 所有的学生将被分组，每组12到15人。// I divided the candies in even proportions among the children. 我把糖果平均分给了孩子们。

words.meaning: 总的，毛的｜搭 Gross Domestic Product (GDP) 国内生产总值；Gross National Product (GNP) 国民生产总值
words.example: Agriculture and its supporting industries account for around 20% of our Gross National Product.
words.exampleCn: 农业及其辅助产业占我国国民生产总值的20％左右。

words.meaning: 衣帽间；〈英〉洗手间

words.exampleCn: 衣帽间就在我们后面，你可以在那儿挂大衣或放包。

words.meaning: 短期的
words.example: Such short-term increases in production are obtained only at a substantial and serious cost to the organisation.
words.exampleCn: 产量的这种短期增长只能以公司的巨额成本为代价。

words.meaning: 拒绝

words.exampleCn: 记者们遭到了外交发言人的断然拒绝。

words.meaning: 优惠券；票证；配给券；参赛表，订货单

words.exampleCn: 请把附上的参赛表填写好。

words.meaning: 册，大部头书；（有学术价值的）巨著

words.exampleCn: 他们喜欢钻研巨著。

words.meaning: 毒素，毒质

words.exampleCn: 吸入的尼古丁会激活血液中的其他毒素。

words.meaning: 同时地
words.example: Where the mining is underground, the surface area can be simultaneously used for forests, cattle grazing and crop raising.
words.exampleCn: 在地下采矿的同时，其表层的土地可以用来造林、放牧和种庄稼。

words.meaning: 荒谬的；可笑的
words.example: The fat old man looked ridiculous in his tight pink trousers.
words.exampleCn: 那个胖老头穿着粉色的紧身裤，显得滑稽可笑。

words.meaning: 碎片；芯片；瑕疵 削（或凿）下（屑片或碎片）
words.example: Electronic chips recorded the presence of a vehicle in a given high traffic area at a given time.
words.exampleCn: 电子芯片记录了特定时间内，车辆在某一繁忙路段的通行情况。

words.meaning: 磨光，擦亮；使优美，润饰 擦光剂，上光蜡｜搭 polish one's English 补习英语；polish furniture 抛光家具
words.example: After the axe had been chipped into shape, the workers needed water and sand for grinding and polishing.
words.exampleCn: 在斧子被削成形之后，工人们需要用水和沙子来打磨和抛光。// The stone should be cut and polished. 这块石头应该被切开并打磨。

words.meaning: 诧异，奇怪；纳闷，想知道 惊奇，惊异；奇迹，奇事｜搭 no wonder 难怪，怪不得

words.exampleCn: 打扰了，我想知道你是否介意回答几个问题？

words.meaning: 奖学金；学问，学识

words.exampleCn: 苏珊获得了在哈佛大学学习的奖学金。

words.meaning: 使熟悉，使通晓；使家喻户晓｜搭 familiarise yourself with sth. 使自己熟悉某事物

words.exampleCn: 阅读流程图以使你熟悉自己的任务。

words.meaning: 期待，期望；预期数额（如寿命等）｜搭 life expectancy 平均寿命

words.meaning: 先令

words.meaning: 蓝图；方案

words.exampleCn: 小汽车轻而易举地就超过火车及公共汽车，成为一种灵活便捷的个人交通工具。

words.meaning: 真正的；真实的

words.exampleCn: 现在美国的16个州利用生物指纹识别系统来确保要求领取福利金的人们的信息真实无误。

words.meaning: 注意的，专心的；关心的，体贴的；留意的

words.meaning: 观察，观测；监视；评述，评论

words.exampleCn: 我们是邮寄调查表，还是面对面采访，亦或是进行观察？

words.meaning: 个人的，私人的；亲自的，本人的；身体的，人身的｜搭 personal loan 个人贷款；personal item 个人物品；personal information 个人信息

words.exampleCn: 丢失公文包的那个妇女向警察提供了一些个人信息。

words.meaning: 生命力，活力｜搭 be full of vitality 充满活力；exceptional vitality 精力旺盛

words.exampleCn: 当你在印度看到亚洲狮时，你能感觉到的就是它们旺盛的生命力。

words.meaning: 需要，需求，要求；需要的东西；必要条件

words.exampleCn: 教务主管将和你谈论课程问题以及每门课程的不同要求。

words.meaning: 可取的，适当的；明智的

words.exampleCn: ：我必须提前预订座位吗？B：哦，是的，这样更好。

words.meaning: 破产的

words.exampleCn: 去年一月份，那家剧院因负债超过一百亿美元而破产。

words.meaning: 倒空；（使）枯竭；消耗

words.meaning: 影响 影响力；产生影响力的人

words.meaning: 想象

words.meaning: 悲惨的；悲剧（性）的

words.meaning: 细木梗；【医】（用于固定受伤肢体的）夹板 用夹板夹

words.exampleCn: 这种火柴是由涂上了硫磺、头部黏有氯酸钾的细木梗制成的。

words.meaning: 泡沫；泡沫材料 起泡沫

words.meaning: 占领；职业；消遣｜搭 a regular occupation 固定职业

words.meaning: 使格式化 安排，计划；版式；格式

words.exampleCn: 你可以用计算机将磁盘格式化。

words.meaning: 学士；单身汉｜搭 bachelor's degree 学士学位；Bachelor of Arts 文学士；Bachelor of Science 理学士

words.meaning: 台风

words.meaning: 约会｜搭 make an appointment 约会

words.meaning: 斜坡；倾斜 倾斜

words.exampleCn: 已经采取措施疏散人群。大多数露营者、徒步旅行者和伐木工人都离开了山坡。// This tower slopes to the north. 这座塔向北倾斜。

words.meaning: 综合体，集合体；建筑群；情结 合成的，综合的；复杂的，难懂的｜搭 inferiority complex 自卑感，自卑情结
words.example: The new sports complex has everything needed for many different activities.
words.exampleCn: 新建的综合体育馆能为多种活动提供所需的一切设施。

words.meaning: 在头顶上的；高架的 天花板；企业管理费用[ˌəuvəˈhed] 在空中，在头顶上，在高处｜搭 overhead projector 高射投影仪
words.example: The overhead cable will be harmful to the transport security.

words.meaning: 人口｜搭 population explosion 人口爆炸；population control 人口控制

words.exampleCn: 世界上还有一大部分人生活在贫困之中。// By the year 2021, the world population will increase by 24%. 到2021年，世界人口将增加24％。

words.meaning: 猎物，捕获物；牺牲品，战利品 捕食；折磨，使烦恼；掠夺｜搭 prey on insects 捕食昆虫为生

words.exampleCn: 大多数动物靠视力进行捕猎。

words.exampleCn: 研究表明女性由于缺乏信心而不能有效地处理自己的经济状况。

words.meaning: 伏特

words.exampleCn: 他从机器中拿掉了一节20伏特的中号电池。

words.meaning: 杂草

words.exampleCn: 害虫和杂草会产生抗药性，所以来年的农药必须更加致命。

words.meaning: 用螺钉固定 螺丝（钉）

words.meaning: 启发；开导；阐明

words.meaning: 纺织品

words.exampleCn: 从17世纪起，这家公司就开始向北美出口纺织品。

words.meaning: 犹豫；不情愿

words.exampleCn: 玛丽在回答这个问题前犹豫了一下，因为她不知道要说什么。

words.meaning: 背景；经历；后台；不重要或不引人注目的地方｜搭 educational/cultural/family background 教育／文化／家庭背景；theoretical background 理论背景；background music 背景音乐

words.meaning: 不可能的，办不到的

words.meaning: 外科医生｜搭 a dental surgeon 牙医

words.exampleCn: 外科医生缝合了伤口。

words.meaning: 允诺，保证；预兆，预示

words.exampleCn: 乌云密布预示有雨。

words.meaning: 电池（组），蓄电池（组）

words.exampleCn: 当你的汽车电池电量不足时，你可以到最近的电池给养站换电池。

words.meaning: 雷；雷声 打雷；轰隆响
words.example: Thunder accompanies lightning.
words.exampleCn: 雷电交加。

words.meaning: 纤细的；精巧的；微妙的

words.exampleCn: 牛皮可以被加工成面积约为0.5平方米且极其精致的皮革。

words.meaning: 说明，解释；（在数量、比例方面）占；导致 账，账户；叙述，说明｜搭 take...into account 考虑…；account for 解释，说明（原因等）；（数量等）占；on account of 因为，由于；give sb. an account of 给某人说明或解释（理由）；not on any account 绝对不
