words.exampleCn: 预计对煤炭的需求将几乎占世界能源需求的27％。

words.meaning: 小册子
words.example: If you look on the back of the booklet, you'll see a map of the school.
words.exampleCn: 看一下这本小册子的背面，你就会看到这所学校的地图。

words.meaning: 布局，安排，设计｜搭 layout of an office 办公室布局；layout of a CV 简历的版面设计；product layout of a supermarket 超市的货品摆放
words.example: The noise factor will have to be taken into consideration with the layout of the houses.
words.exampleCn: 噪音因素必须被纳入房屋设计的考虑范围之内。

words.meaning: 敢于去；拿…冒险，冒…的险 风险投资，（商业等的）风险项目｜搭 venture into the unknown 闯入未知的领域；venture into/on sth. 冒险做…
words.example: Allan, a doctoral student in anthropology, ventured deep into the jungle to search for the primitive natives.
words.exampleCn: 艾伦是一名人类学博士生，他冒险深入丛林腹地寻找原始土著。

words.meaning: （使）收缩；萎缩
words.example: Employees found their time on the job shrinking to 10 hours daily.
words.exampleCn: 雇员们发现他们的工作时间已经减少到每天十小时。

words.meaning: 腺
words.example: This type of hormone is only produced in the pineal gland in the brain.
words.exampleCn: 只有脑部的松果腺才分泌这类荷尔蒙。

words.meaning: 课程，（学校等的）全部课程
words.example: The teacher expects that the curriculum will successfully attract students.
words.exampleCn: 老师希望这种课程安排能成功地吸引学生。

words.meaning: 不足，缺少｜搭 financial shortage 缺钱；shortage of spare time 缺少空闲时间
words.example: The development project was greeted because of Holland's chronic shortage of land.
words.exampleCn: 由于荷兰土地长期短缺，这一开发项目在荷兰大受欢迎。

words.meaning: 证明合格，鉴定合格
words.example: Our school has already reached the standards for the accreditation of colleges.
words.exampleCn: 我们学校已经达到了学院资格认定的标准。

words.meaning: 办事员；职员
words.example: The clerks aren't allowed to accept any collect long- distance calls.
words.exampleCn: 职员不允许接听由接听方付费的长途电话。

words.meaning: 系，贴；认为有重要性（或意义、价值等）；使附属，附加｜搭 attach to 使依恋；把…贴在，附加
words.example: They attached the coupon to the front of the letter.
words.exampleCn: 他们把优惠券附在信的正面。

words.meaning: 轻抛；轻弹
words.example: A switch was flipped and the machine began to operate.
words.exampleCn: 轻弹开关，机器便开始运作。

words.meaning: 注释，评论，意见 注释，评论｜搭 comment on/about... 评论…
words.example: Customer's comments, both positive and negative, are recorded by staff and are collated regularly to identify opportunities for improvement of products.
words.exampleCn: 员工记录来自顾客的正

words.meaning: 强调，着重
words.example: This report emphasizes that cancer is not caused by a single element in cigarette smoke.
words.exampleCn: 这一报告强调，癌症并不是由香烟烟雾中的某单一成分导致的。

words.meaning: 火焰；强烈的感情 发火焰，燃烧
words.example: The house was in flames.
words.exampleCn: 房子失火了。// After hearing the news, her cheeks flamed with rage. 听到消息后，她愤怒得两颊通红。

words.meaning: 预见，预知
words.example: What changes do you foresee in the educational field in the next 50 years?
words.exampleCn: 在未来的50年里，你认为教育界会发生什么变化？

words.meaning: 有历史意义的；历史的，历史性的｜搭 historic moment 历史性的时刻
words.example: There are a number of historic ships docked in the habour.
words.exampleCn: 这个港湾停泊了很多具有历史意义的船舶。

words.meaning: 供应，（一批）供应品；准备，预备；条款，规定；给养，口粮｜搭 make provision 做好准备，预先采取措施；under the provision of sth. 依据…条款
words.example: The country has enough provisions of grain for the future several years.
words.exampleCn: 这个国家为未来几年备有足够的粮食储备。

words.meaning: 总统，校长，会长，（大会）主席
words.example: A lecture will be given by the president of the Union.
words.exampleCn: 该协会主席将发表演讲。

words.meaning: 内科医师
words.example: The professor who teaches us is a respected internist.
words.exampleCn: 教我们的那个教授是一位受人尊敬的内科医师。

words.meaning: 接收，接受；接待，招待会；接收效果｜搭 reception center/desk 接待处
words.example: The students' dormitory is to the right of the reception desk.
words.exampleCn: 学生宿舍在接待处的右边。

words.meaning: 吊，悬挂；推迟；暂停，中止｜搭 suspend a driving license 吊销驾照；suspend payment 暂停付款
words.example: The party representative suspended the talk with the government.
words.exampleCn: 该党代表暂停了和政府的对话。

words.meaning: 勘探者，探险者
words.example: Underground reservoirs were rare sources of permanent water and were vital to early explorers of inland Australia.
words.exampleCn: 地下含水层是罕见的长期水源，对早期进入澳大利亚腹地的探险者至关重要。

words.meaning: 不值得信任的，靠不住的
words.example: They think left-handed people are untrustworthy.
words.exampleCn: 他们认为惯用左手的人不可靠。

words.meaning: 预期的；未来的；可能的｜搭 prospective damage 预计损失
words.example: Department heads composed prospective teams using a combination of people from all three categories.
words.exampleCn: 部门领导从现有所有三组人中选出一些人组成未来的团队。

words.meaning: 百分比，百分率
words.example: What percentage of the workforce was employed in agriculture in this country in the mid 1900s?
words.exampleCn: 在20世纪中期，这个国家从事农业的劳动力在总劳动力中占多大比例？

words.meaning: 线索；提示
words.example: If you do not know a word, you can look to the picture in this book for a clue to its meaning.
words.exampleCn: 如果你碰到不认识的单词，可以通过书中的插图来推测它的意思。

words.meaning: 结巴，口吃 口吃
words.example: Left-handed children, forced to use their right hand, often develop a stammer.
words.exampleCn: 本来惯用左手的小孩在被迫改用右手后，通常会患口吃。

words.meaning: 鹰，隼
words.example: The hawk swooped on its prey.
words.exampleCn: 老鹰向猎物猛扑过去。

words.meaning: 淹没；使应接不暇 沼泽
words.example: The tsunami swamped the port city.
words.exampleCn: 海啸吞没了这座港口城市。

words.meaning: 嫉妒的；猜疑的
words.example: Tom is jealous of anyone who talks to his girlfriend.
words.exampleCn: 汤姆对每个和她女友说话的人都心存猜疑。

words.meaning: 帮忙；偏爱；赞同；恩惠 赞同；较喜欢，偏袒；有利于
words.example: Darkness favoured their escape.
words.exampleCn: 黑暗有利于他们逃跑。// I favour a state income tax over a raise in the sales tax. 我赞成用收取所得税来代替提高营业税。

words.meaning: 易变的，无常的
words.example: I knew that he was a fickle man, and one you could never rely on.
words.exampleCn: 我知道他是个反复无常的人，你绝不能依赖他。

words.meaning: 向上，往上；上坡；艰难地
words.example: We cycled uphill for over an hour.
words.exampleCn: 我们骑自行车爬了一个多小时的山坡。

words.meaning: 成功；接着发生｜搭 succeed in (doing) sth. 在…中取得成功
words.example: One Winter Olympics has succeeded another every four years since 1924, with a break only for the Second World War.
words.exampleCn: 从1924年开始冬奥会每四年举办一次，只在二战期间中断过一次。

words.meaning: 性别；（语法中的）性｜搭 gender equality 男女平等
words.example: The gender gap is being attenuated in modern society.
words.exampleCn: 在现代社会里，性别差距正在弱化。

words.meaning: 连续不断的，连贯的｜搭 consecutive days 连续几天；consecutive years 连年
words.example: You should give a clear and consecutive narrative for your report.
words.exampleCn: 你应该就你的报告给出一个清晰、连贯的陈述。

words.meaning: 转向，转移，转换；转移视线的事物；娱乐｜搭 create a diversion 转移注意力
words.example: Most water diversion projects are harmful to the fish population.
words.exampleCn: 大多数的水系改道工程都会危及鱼群。

words.meaning: 捐赠，赠送｜搭 donate money and materials 捐赠钱和物资
words.example: I should also like to say if you do have a bike to donate, it doesn't matter what condition it is in.
words.exampleCn: 我还想说如果你有自行车可以捐赠，那么不管它是什么状况都没关系。

words.meaning: 防御，保护；辩护；答辩；[pl.]防务工事｜搭 natural defence mechanisms 先天性防御机制；defence against 防御…
words.example: The defence of the country must be reinforced.
words.exampleCn: 该国的防务工事必须加强。

words.meaning: 卷，册；体积；音量
words.example: This liquid was 10 litres in volume.
words.exampleCn: 这一液体的体积为十升。// Would you turn down the volume, please? 你能将音量开小点吗？

words.meaning: 退款[riˈfʌnd] 退还（钱款），偿付｜搭 full refund 全额偿还；give sb. a refund 给某人退款
words.example: You can't get a refund if you don't have any invoices.
words.exampleCn: 如果你没有发票就不能获得退款。

words.meaning: 不顾后果地；无论如何｜搭 regardless of 不管
words.example: Regardless of the theory or model that we choose, a reduction in population size decreases the genetic diversity of a population.
words.exampleCn: 无论我们选择何种理论或研究样本，人口减少都会降低该种群的基因多样性。

words.meaning: 使…凸出；压花（纹）
words.example: The hotel's name was embossed on all the towels.
words.exampleCn: 所有毛巾上都压印有旅馆的名字。

words.meaning: 国际主义者 国际主义者的
words.example: We established links and access to the internationalist organisations and their resources.
words.exampleCn: 我们与国际主义者组织建立了联系，并有权使用他们的资源。

words.meaning: （使人或动物）散开，驱散；撒；撒播｜搭 scatter...over... 把…撒在…；scatter strength 分散精力
words.example: The farmer scattered the seeds on the field.
words.exampleCn: 农民在地里播种。

words.meaning: 食欲，胃口；欲望｜搭 appetite for... 对…的食欲；对…的兴趣
words.example: My supper by this time was cold, and my appetite was gone.
words.exampleCn: 我的晚餐这时候已经凉了，我也没胃口了。

words.meaning: 流行，盛行；占优势，战胜｜搭 prevail on/upon 说服，劝说
words.example: The use of horses for ploughing still prevails in this area.
words.exampleCn: 在这一地区用马耕地还很普遍。

words.meaning: 词汇表；术语表
words.example: You'll find the meaning of the difficult words used on this website in the glossary.
words.exampleCn: 你能在词汇表中查到此网页上难词的意思。

words.meaning: 合并；巩固
words.example: The global airline industry was heading towards more consolidation.
words.exampleCn: 全球航空业的合并之风日益盛行。

words.meaning: 友好，善意；信誉
words.example: The manufacturer will lose customers and goodwill if word gets around that the product is unreliable.
words.exampleCn: 一旦产品不可靠的消息传了出去，生产商便会失去顾客及信誉。

words.meaning: 积聚
words.example: The monopoly capitalists amassed fabulous wealth during World War Ⅱ.
words.exampleCn: 二战期间，垄断资本家大发横财。

words.meaning: 联邦的，联盟的
words.example: I opened a current account at the Federal Bank.
words.exampleCn: 我在联邦银行开了一个活期账户。

words.meaning: 考虑；思考；体谅｜搭 in consideration of 考虑到…；由于…
words.example: After a few moments' consideration, they refused the invitation.
words.exampleCn: 他们考虑片刻后，拒绝了邀请。

words.meaning: 握紧，抓牢；吸引住…的注意力（或想象力等） 紧握，抓牢；掌握，控制｜搭 be in the grip of 在…的掌控下
words.example: She gripped on to the railing with both hands.
words.exampleCn: 她双手紧紧抓住栏杆。

words.meaning: 大厦；（豪华的）宅邸
words.example: Mary and her family lived in a mansion.
words.exampleCn: 玛丽一家住在一座大房子里。

words.meaning: [the G-]银河；星系；群英
words.example: Scientists intend to discover a sun-like fixed star in remote galaxies.
words.exampleCn: 科学家们试图在遥远的星系中找到一颗类似太阳的恒星。

words.meaning: 路线；路程｜搭 cycling route 骑自行车游览路线；shipping route 海运航线；air route 空运航线
words.example: This map will show the route across the mountains.
words.exampleCn: 这张地图上有穿越群山的路线。

words.meaning: 缺乏，不足
words.example: The short child of tall parents very likely had a hormone deficiency early in life.
words.exampleCn: 父母个子高而孩子个子矮，极有可能是由幼年分泌的荷尔蒙不足造成的。

words.meaning: 在…对面 对面的，对立的；相反的，相对的 对立面，对立物
words.example: The classroom is near the main entrance, just opposite the reception desk.
words.exampleCn: 教室位于主入口附近，正对着接待处。

words.meaning: 轰动性的，引起哗然的；耸人听闻的；极好的；绝妙的｜搭 sensational discovery 轰动性的发现；sensational headlines 耸人听闻的头条新闻
words.example: The performance given by the newcomers is a sensational success.
words.exampleCn: 新来者的表演相当成功。

words.meaning: 分享；参与
words.example: The students below 20 years old are not given the participation in the ball.
words.exampleCn: 20岁以下的学生不允许参加舞会。

words.meaning: （痛苦等）减轻，解除；援救，救济；安慰；缓合剂｜搭 to one's relief 令人感到放心的是
words.example: The relief material was flown to the flood-hit districts.
words.exampleCn: 救灾物资被空运至洪灾区。

words.meaning: 耕种，耕作；培养，教育
words.example: Now, the cultivation of crops and the husbandry of livestock can bring great profit.
words.exampleCn: 如今，种植农作物和饲养牲畜能获得丰厚的利润。

words.meaning: 声称，自命；自负，自命不凡
words.example: The woman, having fewer pretensions, is far more willing to learn.
words.exampleCn: 这个女人并没有自命不凡，而是非常愿意学东西。

words.meaning: 控制，利用；上马具 马具｜搭 harness a river 治理河流；harness nuclear energy 利用核能
words.example: The dam stores water for such functions as the irrigation of crops and the harnessing of the force of gravity for the generation of electricity.
words.exampleCn: 大坝的存水可以用来灌溉农作物或利用重力来发电等。

words.meaning: 被弄弯的，弯曲的 爱好，天赋｜搭 a bent nail 弯曲的钉子；be bent on doing sth. 决意做某事
words.example: If you are buying a cot, do make sure that any metal present is not rusted or bent in any way.
words.exampleCn: 购买婴儿床的时候，一定要确保床的金属不能生锈或怎么都不会被弄弯。

words.meaning: （集体）宿舍
words.example: The club has long-term dormitory accommodation.
words.exampleCn: 俱乐部提供长期的宿舍住宿服务。

words.meaning: 缝，缝合 一针，针脚｜搭 drop a stitch（织毛衣时）掉针了；cross stitch 十字绣；back stitch 回针，返针；stitch sth. up 把某物缝合
words.example: Susan is stitching her old clothes.
words.exampleCn: 苏珊正在缝旧衣服。

words.meaning: 手册，指南 手的，手工的，体力的｜搭 manual workers 手工劳动者；manual labour 体力劳动
words.example: You should read the manual instruction carefully before fixing the air-conditioner.
words.exampleCn: 安装空调前你应该仔细阅读指导手册。

words.meaning: 极小量；螨虫
words.example: The hives will be replaced because of mites or an ageing or dead queen.
words.exampleCn: 蜂箱会因为螨虫或者蜂后的衰老或死亡等情况而被更换。

words.meaning: 窃贼
words.example: When you leave the house, make sure the windows and doors are shut, and set the burglar alarm.
words.exampleCn: 当你离开房子时，务必关好门窗，并打开防盗报警器。

words.meaning: 计划，方案；体系，体制；阴谋 计划，策划；密谋
words.example: The government has been funding a loans scheme for students in higher education since September 1990.
words.exampleCn: 自1990年9月起，政府就开始为大学生贷款计划提供资金。

words.meaning: 加，增加（物）｜搭 in addition 另外；in addition to... 除…之外
words.example: This fruit is a welcome addition to the English diet.
words.exampleCn: 这种添加在英式食谱中的水果很受欢迎。

words.meaning: 感觉的，感官的｜搭 a sensory organ 感觉器官
words.example: Mr. Roger is a scientist working in the field of sensory perception.
words.exampleCn: 罗杰先生是感官知觉领域的一名科学家。

words.meaning: 树丛，小树林
words.example: At this time, beehives are in particular demand by farmers who have almond groves.
words.exampleCn: 这时，拥有杏树林的农民就尤其需要蜂箱。

words.meaning: 唯物主义的；物质享乐主义的，贪图享乐的
words.example: Modern society is often called materialistic.
words.exampleCn: 现代社会通常被称为是物质享乐主义的。

words.meaning: 分开，分离；分遣｜搭 detach from... 从…分离；拆下；使分开；semi-detached house 半独立式住宅
words.example: The mechanic detached the oil filter.
words.exampleCn: 机工拆开了滤油器。

words.meaning: 洪流；爆发；（话语等的）连发
words.example: As ice and snow melted, they touched off devastating torrents of mud and debris.
words.exampleCn: 冰雪融化引发了破坏力极大的泥石流。

words.meaning: 澄清；阐明
words.example: Talking to students about the requirements of a course helps to clarify what needs to be done.
words.exampleCn: 告诉学生课程要求有助于他们了解自己所需要完成的工作。

words.meaning: 口渴的；饥渴的
words.example: The moisture is absorbed by thirsty plants.
words.exampleCn: 饥渴的植物吸收了水汽。

words.meaning: 检查，检阅
words.example: The general inspected the troops.
words.exampleCn: 将军检阅了军队。

words.meaning: 缝，接缝；煤层
words.example: The sailors couldn't find anything to caulk the seams in the boat.
words.exampleCn: 水手们找不到任何东西来填塞船上的裂缝。

words.meaning: 农业；农学
words.example: Many people in this area make a living from agriculture.
words.exampleCn: 这个地区的许多人以务农为生。

words.meaning: 微观世界；缩影
words.example: Malaysia's universities have always been a microcosm of Malaysian society.
words.exampleCn: 马来西亚的大学往往是整个马来西亚社会的缩影。

words.meaning: 外科学；外科手术；手术室，诊疗室｜搭 heart bypass surgery 心脏搭桥手术
words.example: They perform surgery between 9:00 and 11:30 every weekday.
words.exampleCn: 他们在每个工作日的9:00到11:30做手术。

words.meaning: 大灾难
words.example: The flood was a major catastrophe, reducing population sizes in areas involved.
words.exampleCn: 洪水是一场大灾难，使受灾地区的人口减少。

words.meaning: 使劳累过分；对…使用过度；滥用（词等） 过重的工作；工作过度
words.example: He has been overworking for two months, at last he fell ill in the workplace.
words.exampleCn: 他已经连续劳累工作两个月之久，最后病倒在了工作岗位上。

words.meaning: 父的；母的；父母（般）的
words.example: The government repeatedly stressed its support for parental choice in the selection of a child's school.
words.exampleCn: 政府一再重申其支持家长对孩子教育的选择权。

words.meaning: 沉淀物；沉积物（如沙、砾、石、泥等）
words.example: There was heavy brown sediment in the bottom of the bottle.
words.exampleCn: 水壶的底部有厚厚的棕色沉淀物。

words.meaning: 各种各样的；不同的；多方面的
words.example: The professor has studied the languages of various countries.
words.exampleCn: 这位教授研究过多个国家的语言。

words.meaning: 重修，补考｜搭 resit the exam 参加补考
words.example: The four students resat the final examinations and passed this time.
words.exampleCn: 这四名学生参加了期末考试补考，这次都通过了。

words.meaning: 威胁；危险的人（或物） 威胁到，危及｜搭 a menace to sb./sth. 对…的威胁
words.example: Let's look at some of the reasons why back pain is developing into such a unique menace.
words.exampleCn: 让我们来看一看为什么背疼会演变成一种顽疾。

words.meaning: 包含，容纳，装有；控制，阻止，遏制｜搭 contain oneself 自制
words.example: It is traditionally accepted that children's books should contain a few pictures.
words.exampleCn: 从传统意义上来说，人们普遍认为儿童读物中应该配有一些插图。

words.meaning: 扎牢，扣住
words.example: The driver must fasten his seat belt before driving.
words.exampleCn: 司机在开车前必须系好安全带。

words.meaning: 建立；确立；安置，使定居｜搭 establish goals 树立目标；establish relations 建立联系
words.example: You may have to establish new eating habits in order to keep healthy.
words.exampleCn: 为了保持健康，你需要养成一些新的饮食习惯。

words.meaning: 位置，方位；职位，职务；姿势，姿态；见解，立场 安放，安置｜搭 be in a position to do sth. 能够做…，有做…的机会；leave sth./sb. in the position of 使…处于…
words.example: The position of women in society has changed markedly in the last twenty years.
words.exampleCn: 在过去的20年间，妇女的社会地位有了显著的改变。

words.meaning: 模仿，模拟；假装，伪装；扮演
words.example: The experiment simulated a natural environment.
words.exampleCn: 这个试验模拟了一种自然环境。

words.meaning: 划伤，抓痕 抓，搔；划破，划损｜搭 from scratch 从头做起，从零开始；up to scratch 达到应有的水平
words.example: There is a small scratch on my bag.
words.exampleCn: 我的包上有一道不长的划痕。

words.meaning: 弹性工作制
words.example: Flexitime is one good method to reduce the number of vehicles traveling together at rush hour.
words.exampleCn: 采用弹性工作制是降低交通高峰期时车流量的好方法。

words.meaning: 帮助，援助，协助｜搭 assist with/in 帮助
words.example: The Student Union is intended to assist in teachers' work.
words.exampleCn: 学生会旨在协助老师工作。

words.meaning: 哺乳动物｜搭 marine mammals 海洋哺乳动物
words.example: The insect lives on small mammals and birds.
words.exampleCn: 这种小虫子寄生在小型哺乳动物和鸟类身上。

words.meaning: 不合法的，违法的｜搭 illegal profit 非法利润；illegal drugs 毒品；illegal activities 非法活动
words.example: The police arrested the old lady for illegal possession of drugs.
words.exampleCn: 警方以非法持有毒品为由逮捕了这位老妇人。

words.meaning: 最终地
words.example: The paper was written, edited, typeset and ultimately printed.
words.exampleCn: 报纸经过编写、编辑、排版最后被印刷出来。

words.meaning: 肌腱；力量的来源
words.example: The athletes were so nervous that we could see all their sinews tense.
words.exampleCn: 运动员非常紧张，以致我们能看到他们紧绷的肌肉。

words.meaning: 人工的，人造的；假的，矫揉造作的；模拟的｜搭 artificial color 人工色素，合成色素；artificial intelligence 人工智能
words.example: We use no artificial additives of any kind in our products.
words.exampleCn: 我们的产品绝不含任何人工添加剂。

words.meaning: 面纱；遮蔽物 蒙着面纱；掩饰
words.example: They lifted the veil of this ancient tomb.
words.exampleCn: 他们揭开了这座古代陵墓的神秘面纱。

words.meaning: 倾向于，趋于；照料；招待
words.example: Women tend to research thoroughly before applying for positions or attending interviews.
words.exampleCn: 在申请职位或是参加面试前，女性往往会（对应聘公司及职位）进行全面彻底的了解。

words.meaning: 除去；免职；搬迁
words.example: I saw a removal van outside your house yesterday afternoon.
words.exampleCn: 昨天下午我看见你家屋外停着一辆搬家卡车。

words.meaning: 可相比拟的事物（或人），相似处；纬线 平行的；类似的，相对应的；并行的 与…相似；比得上｜搭 parallel to 与…平行；parallel lines 平行线；parallel bars 双杠
words.example: The expressway is parallel to the railway.
words.exampleCn: 这条高速公路与铁路平行。// Tom's experiences parallel mine in many instances. 在很多方面，汤姆的经历都与我的相似。

words.meaning: 强迫｜搭 compel sb. to do sth. 强迫某人做某事
words.example: The boss compels workers to spend more time on the job.
words.exampleCn: 老板强迫工人花更多的时间在工作上。

words.meaning: 立即，马上；紧接地；直接地
words.example: You go down to the end of this corridor and turn right. The computer lab is immediately on your right.
words.exampleCn: 走到走廊尽头向右拐，右手边就是机房。

words.meaning: 研究所，学院 建立，设立｜搭 financial institute 金融研究所
words.example: The language Institute provides student support, welfare and activities services.
words.exampleCn: 语言学院为学生提供资助、福利和活动服务。

words.meaning: 连续剧 连续的；顺序排列的
words.example: A lot of people complained that American police serials were particularly violent.
words.exampleCn: 许多人抱怨美国的警匪片太暴力了。

words.meaning: 监督，监视（某人或某物）；俯瞰，眺望｜搭 oversee the project 监督这个项目
words.example: You must appoint someone to oversee the project.
words.exampleCn: 你得指

words.meaning: 加强；增援
words.example: Concrete with steel bars in it is known as reinforced concrete.
words.exampleCn: 水泥中加入钢条就成了我们所知的钢筋混凝土。

words.meaning: 委托；许诺；承担义务
words.example: This commitment has been clearly defined in the act.
words.exampleCn: 这项法案中明确定义了这一义务的内容。

words.meaning: 捐款；捐赠
words.example: The work of the charity is funded by voluntary donations.
words.exampleCn: 这家慈善机构工作所需资金是人们自愿捐赠的。

words.meaning: 好奇的；奇怪的｜搭 be curious about 对…好奇
words.example: Further observation by astronomers revealed two curious facts.
words.exampleCn: 宇航员经过进一步观察发现了两个奇怪的现象。

words.meaning: 丛林
words.example: They ventured deep into the jungle and sought out an isolated tribe.
words.exampleCn: 他们冒险进入丛林深处，找到了一个与世隔绝的部落。

words.meaning: 透支；透支额
words.example: Some workers have a huge overdraft to pay off every month.
words.exampleCn: 一些工人每个月都要偿还巨额透支款。

words.meaning: 视力的；光学的｜搭 optical aids 助视器
words.example: We'll discuss optical fibres and how they could be used in the future to improve optical instruments.
words.exampleCn: 我们将讨论光纤以及将来如何把它们用于改善光学仪器等问题。

words.meaning: 另样，用别的方法；在其他方面 要不然，否则
words.example: It's a ten-minute taxi ride from the station and will cost you£5, otherwise, you can take the bus which runs every half and an hour from the station.
words.exampleCn: 从车站打车（到这）要十分钟，车费是五英镑。另外，你还可以乘从车站出发的公共汽车，一个半小时一班。

words.meaning: 持有，拥有；所有权；所有物，财产，财富；领土｜搭 in sb.'s possession 被某人占有；in possession of sth. 占有某物
words.example: It would be a good idea to get some insurance for the furniture and other personal possessions.
words.exampleCn: 给家具和其他一些个人财产上保险是一个不错的主意。

words.meaning: 不管用什么方法，然而 无论如何，不管怎样；可是；仍然
words.example: I feel a bit sleepy, however, I keep studying.
words.exampleCn: 我觉得有点困了，但我还是坚持学习。

words.meaning: 零售 零售，以…价格销售｜搭 retail price 零售价；retail trade 零售业；a retail shop零售店
words.example: What sorts of shop do you like best, the department store or the small retails?
words.exampleCn: 你最喜欢哪种商店，百货商场还是小零售店？

words.meaning: 文化的，人文的
words.example: The exhibition showed some cultural relics of the primeval times.
words.exampleCn: 该展览展出了很多原始时期的文化遗产。

words.meaning: 道德，美德｜搭 public morality 公共道德
words.example: Mankind has undergone great improvement in intelligence or morality.
words.exampleCn: 人类无论在智力方面还是在道德方面都经历了巨大的进步。

words.meaning: 办理；处理；交易，业务；[pl.]会报，学报
words.example: The teller told me that the computer system was temporarily down, so they couldn't do any transactions.
words.exampleCn: 出纳员告诉我计算机系统临时出故障了，所以他们不能进行任何交易。

words.meaning: 两倍的，双重的；两部分的 两倍地，双重地
words.example: There has been a twofold increase in the number of rare birds in the past decade.
words.exampleCn: 在过去的十年，珍稀鸟类的数量增加了两倍。

words.meaning: 解答，解决办法；溶解，溶液
words.example: It took time to find solution to the problem.
words.exampleCn: 找到解决该问题的方法需要时间。

words.meaning: 大使馆；大使馆全体官员｜搭 the American Embassy in Paris 美国驻巴黎大使馆
words.example: Your visa application is being processed at the UK Embassy.
words.exampleCn: 你的签证正由英国大使馆办理。

words.meaning: 评论，谈论；注意到，察觉 评语，评论；注释｜搭 remark about/on 评论；make a remark on 对…发表评论
words.example: Can you remark the differences between the two paintings?
words.exampleCn: 你能说出这两幅画的不同之处吗？

words.meaning: 耽搁，延迟，延期，迟滞
words.example: After a delay of two days, the whole team continued the journey.
words.exampleCn: 耽搁了两天后，整个小组继续行进。

words.meaning: （代表）大会；（美国等国的）国会，议会｜搭 the support of Congress 国会的支持；the People's Congress 人民代表大会
words.example: The congress called on the local governments to reopen schools after the war.
words.exampleCn: 战后，国会号召地方政府重开学校。

words.meaning: 微生物，细菌；起源，萌芽
words.example: The patient had not the strength to throw off the germs that had invaded his immune system.
words.exampleCn: 病人已无力摆脱已经侵入他免疫系统的病菌。

words.meaning: 方式；流行款式；时装
words.example: You'll find all sorts of things in the museum: old suitcases, ships' crockery, and classical cabins decorated in the fashion of the day.
words.exampleCn: 在博物馆里你会找到各类东西：陈旧的手提箱、陶制船模型，还有以当时风格装饰的古典小屋。

words.meaning: 行李式传送带
words.example: I put my baggage on the airport carousel.
words.exampleCn: 我把行李放到机场的行李传送带上。

words.meaning: 溅；泼
words.example: I refreshed myself by splashing cold water on my face.
words.exampleCn: 我往脸上扑冷水让自己精神起来。

words.meaning: 预先，事先
words.example: The experiment will last for one year. Beforehand several months are devoted to planning.
words.exampleCn: 试验将持续一年的时间。在此之前，要用几个月的时间制订计划。

words.meaning: 铁锹
words.example: We need a spade if we're going to dig a pit.
words.exampleCn: 如果我们要挖个深坑，就需要一把铁锹。

words.meaning: 过滤器 过滤；（消息等）走漏｜搭 filter tip（香烟的）过滤嘴；filter sth. out 把…滤出
words.example: Workers find that machines work much better if they change the filters regularly.
words.exampleCn: 工人们发现如果他们能定期更换机器里的过滤器，机器就会运转得更好。

words.meaning: 方面；（建筑物的）朝向，方向；外貌，外观样子｜搭 in all aspects 全面；aspect of …方面
words.example: A great deal of empirical evidence shows that pictures in a book interfere in a damaging way with all aspects of learning to read.
words.exampleCn: 大量经验表明，书中的插图给学习阅读的各方面都造成了不利影响。

words.meaning: 反对；反对的理由
words.example: If no one has any objection against the decision, I'll declare the meeting is closed.
words.exampleCn: 如果没人反对这个决议，那么我将宣布会议结束。

words.meaning: 隧道；地道 挖（地道），开（隧道）
words.example: The prisoner had escaped by tunnelling.
words.exampleCn: 犯人挖地道逃跑了。

words.meaning: 对比；对照[kənˈtrɑ:st] 对比；对照；形成对比｜搭 by contrast 对比之下；（与…）相对照；in contrast with/to 与…形成对比；contrast A with B 把A与B进行对比
words.example: This white peak contrasts finely with the blue sky.
words.exampleCn: 这座雪白的山峰同蔚蓝的天空交相辉映。

words.meaning: 作用，影响；结果；效果 使产生，招致；实现｜搭 carry/bring into effect 使生效，实施；in effect 有效；实际上；take effect 生效，起作用；side effects 副作用；a positive effect 积极影响；cause and effect 原因和结果
words.example: The report suggests that the smoke experienced by many people in their daily lives is enough to produce substantial adverse effects on a person's heart and lungs.
words.exampleCn: 报告指出，许多人在日常生活中吸入的（香烟）烟雾足以给他们的心脏和肺造成严重的负面影响。

words.meaning: 包裹
words.example: She sent a parcel of books to her younger sister.
words.exampleCn: 她寄给妹妹一包书。

words.meaning: 距离；远方；一长段时间
words.example: Underground water can flow very large distances and can be kept in underground reservoirs for a very long time.
words.exampleCn: 地下水可以流经很长的距离，并能在地下含水层中储藏相当长时间。

words.meaning: 茎；（树）干；词干 止住，抑止，堵住，阻止｜搭 stem from 源于
words.example: As the axe cut through the stem, the tree fell.
words.exampleCn: 斧子砍断树干时，树倒了下来。

words.meaning: 正常的，平常的；标准的，规范的，正规的$｜搭 normal education 师范教育；正规教育；normal state 标准状态，常态
words.example: The normal noise threshold for private housing is 55 decibels.
words.exampleCn: 私人住宅区标准的噪音音量上限为55分贝。

words.meaning: 真挚的，诚挚的，真诚的，诚恳的
words.example: My respect to you is very sincere.
words.exampleCn: 我对您的尊敬是非常诚挚的。

words.meaning: 总结，概括
words.example: The speaker summarised the important points of her lecture.
words.exampleCn: 演讲者概括了她演讲中的重点。

words.meaning: 胎儿；胚胎
words.example: Every brain is initially female in its organisation and it only becomes a male brain when the male foetus begins to secrete hormones.
words.exampleCn: 每一个大脑在结构上最初都是雌性的，只有当雄性胚胎开始分泌荷尔蒙时才变成雄性。

words.meaning: （使）结合
words.example: Fact and fiction merge together in his latest thriller.
words.exampleCn: 在他最新的惊险小说中，真实和虚构相互交织。

words.meaning: 知道的；意识到的｜搭 be aware of 意识到…
words.example: Most ecologists were aware that the areas of Amazonia they were working in had been shaped by human settlement.
words.exampleCn: 大多数生态学家意识到他们研究的亚马孙地区已经受到人类居住的影响。派unaware（a. 不知道的，未意识到的）；awareness（n. 知道）

words.meaning: 贴标签于 标签，标记；称号；绰号，外号｜搭 label as 把…称为
words.example: I think we should label the lid itself and say that it constitutes twenty-five percent of the total weight.
words.exampleCn: 我认为我们应该在盖子上贴上标签，注明盖子本身占总重的25％。

words.meaning: 保证；允诺 保证；担保物｜搭 guarantee to 保证…；guarantee sb. sth. 保证某人某事
words.example: The box is made of stainless steel which is guaranteed for 20 years.
words.exampleCn: 这个盒子是不锈钢的，品质保证为20年。

words.meaning: 相互关联，相互影响
words.example: This study examined the interrelationship between environment and human behaviour.
words.exampleCn: 这项研究考察了环境和人类行为的相互影响。

words.meaning: 文具
words.example: They manage the Student Union paper shop, selling magazines and newspapers as well as stationery and sweets.
words.exampleCn: 他们负责管理学生会的报刊亭，销售杂志、报纸，还有文具和糖果。

words.meaning: 石灰石，石灰岩
words.example: The limestone has to be dug out of the mine and transported to the power station.
words.exampleCn: 石灰石必须从矿山挖出，然后被运往发电站。
